## Alchemical Hydra/Strategies
Alchemical Hydra is an end game boss that drops the pieces to create the File:Brimstone ring.png Brimstone ring and the File:Dragon hunter lance.png Dragon hunter lance.

## Requirements 
Alchemical hydra requires 20px 90 Slayer and Prestige level 1. 

Recommended Prestige 5 of chosen combat style and prestige 4-5 18px Defence.

## Getting there 
Use the File:Portable portal.pngPortal nexus located north of spawn. Under bosses find Alchemical Hydra.
Travel fee: File:Coins.png 100k.

## Mechanics 
Alchemical Hydra attacks with both Magic and Ranged attacks.
*Magic is a spit projectile, Ranged is a Spike.
**The first hit is random but will then switch between the two after 3 attacks.
***After 3 attacks Hydra will use a special attack depending on the phase.
Each phase of the hydra has a special attack and to make him weaker you MUST drag him over the vents in the room starting with the South-Eastern Vent.

Phase 1 special attack is green poison. Move away from said location, 2-3 tiles is usually enough.

Phase 2 special attack is 4 lightning beams that will converge on the player. Move Hydra to the North-Eastern Vent.
*Try to Dodge them as best you can while keeping Hydra on the North-Eastern Vent
**They will disable your protection prayers, Hydra can hit well over 90 damage at once off-prayer.

Phase 3 Special is Fire bombs. Move Hydra to the North-Western Vent.
*Hydra will shoot 4 fire bombs, move 4 tiles as they leave a 3x3 area of effect.

Phase 4 starts at 20% HP. This is what's known as Jad phase.
*Hydra will now swap between Magic and Ranged every attack.
**Can use any special's from the three phases.
*If using executioner this phase is bsaically skipped.

## Recommended talents 

The recommended combat style for Alchemical Hydra is Magic.

## Boss Token
50px|left 

Boss Tokens are a currency dropped by killing any Boss in August. Boss Tokens can be spent at the Boss Token Store for various upgrades and rewards. 

Boss Tokens are tradeable.

## Boss Token Store
The "Boss Token Store" shop is accessible to Ironman players.

The shop uses Boss tokens as its currency.

## Boss progression guide
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center"
! Boss !! Tier !! Recommended Stats/Gear !! Notes
|-
| Giant mole
| 70
| 43 Prayer
70+ Attack/Ranged/Mage
| 
* All damage from the Giant mole can be mitigated using Protection from Melee prayers.
|-
| King Black Dragon
| 72
| 43 Prayer
80+ Attack/RangedMage
| 
* The Antivenom and Antifire perks mitigate most fire breath and all poison damage dealt.
* With the Antifire perk, Protection from Magic, and standing out of melee range, the KBD will deal no damage.
|}
Category:Guides

## Cerberus/Strategies
## Requirements 
There are no requirements for Cerberus

## Getting there 
Utilizing the Portal nexus, players can select Cerberus from the available Boss options for 75,000 GP

## Mechanics 
Cerberus has three types of attacks: Ranged, Mage, and avoidable ground damage. When its health drops to approximately 50%, Cerberus summons three ghosts. These ghosts must be defeated using the combat style they are resistant to—Red for Melee, Green for Ranged, and Blue for Mage. Failing to pray correctly against Cerberus' attacks will result in a loss of prayer points.

* Spiky ball is Ranged
* Smooth ball is mage
* Shakes head lava pool is about to spawn under your feet

## Recommended Talents 
24pxMagic is the recommended combat style to use against Cerberus.
 Early Game Talents =

## Equipment 

Magic =
File:slayer helmet.pngSlayer helmet(i) and other cosmetic variants
The Slayer helmet provides a 15% strength and 12% accuracy (all combat styles) increase when fighting monsters assigned as your Slayer task. While it offers no combat advantages against non-task creatures, it's the optimal choice during any Slayer assignment. Consider switching to alternative headgear when battling monsters outside your assigned task.
1 used to prioritize ancients for utility.2 used to prioritize healing.

## Corporeal Beast/Strategies
## Requirements
There are no requirements for Corporeal Beast. Nixite can assign up to 35 Corporeal Beast.

## Getting there 
Utilizing the Portal nexus, players can select Corporeal Beast from the available Boss options.

## Mechanics 
The Corporeal Beast is a high-health boss that uses both Magic and Melee attacks. Throughout the fight, it periodically spawns a Dark Energy Core. It is recommended to bring a ranged weapon switch to kill the core quickly otherwise the core will follow you around dealing damage and healing Corporeal Beast. During the fight, players should use Protect from Magic prayer and use Blood spells for healing.

## Boss drops (common/uncommon) (4/65)
{| class="wikita
[... 1254 more chars ...]

## Ignis/Strategies
Ignis is a high level version of Cerberus, requiring multiple combat styles to be fought effectively. As such, it is recommended to have high Prestige levels across multiple combat styles, as well as Key Stone talents to supplement offstyles. A slayer task for Hellhounds or a boss slayer task for Cerberus is recommended, as is demonbane equipment such as the Demonite Defender.

Ignis shares several uniques with Cerberus, dropping everything except the Dragon metal lump, Dragon metal shard, and Dragon metal slice, instead dropping the unique Hellhide and Cerberite core which are used to create strong demonbane equipment in the form of the Cerberite slayer helmet, Cerberite grippers, and Cerberite warhammer.

## Requirements

## Hard requirements
* Use of a Key master teleport scroll or permanent access unlock.
* Slayer Locked accounts require an Ignis task, obtainable after Prestige 4 Slayer.

## Recommendations
* Minimum Prestige 7 in your main combat style and Prestige 5 in offstyles. This can be lower if exploiting Weaknesses.
* Minimum T90 gear or higher across all three styles.
* Hellhound or Cerberus boss slayer task.
* Talents as detailed in Recommended talents.

## Getting there
Ignis can be challenged by using a Key master teleport scroll, which can be purchased from the Slayer Point Store or received as a drop from Cerberus. Permanent access can be unlocked by combining 50 Key master teleports with the Key master's key obtained as a reward from the "Doombringer" achievement. Players can then use the "Enter (hard mode)" option on the winch in the Cerberus lair.

To access the Cerberus lair, use the File:Portable portal.pngPortal nexus located north of spawn. Under bosses, find Cerberus.
Travel fee: File:Coins.png 75,000

## Mechanics

## Basic Attacks
Similarly to Cerberus, Ignis has three basic attacks:
* A projectile Ranged attack, in which Ignis stands on its hind legs and fires a spiked ball;
* A projectile Mage attack, in which Ignis lowers its head and
[... 5260 more chars ...]

## Kraken/Strategies
Kraken is a Slayer boss that can be killed while on a Slayer task.

## Requirements
Level 20px 85 and a Kraken task from Nixite assignments or boss assignments.

## Getting there
Utilizing the Portal nexus, players can select Kraken from the available Boss options.

## Mechanics
Kraken attacks you with multiple magic strikes simultaneously using its enormous tentacles. These attacks cannot be avoided by the 'Protect from Magic' prayer. However, Kraken's primary attack can still be evaded by using the 'Protect from Magic' prayer.

## Recommended Talents

Magic = 
32pxMagic is the recommended combat style to use against Kraken

{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Talents !! colspan="7" | Talents (Minimum Required)
|-
| Tier 1
| Double Cast: 1/1Deft Strikes: 4/5
|-
| Tier 2
| Menacing Mage: 5/5Resilience I: 5/5Renewal: 5/5
|-
| Tier 3
| Draining Strikes: 5/5Holy Vestments: 5/5
|-
| Tier 4
| Pious Protections: 5/5
|-
| Tier 5
| N/A

| N/A

| N/A

|}

## Equipment

Magic =
File:slayer helmet.pngSlayer helmet(i) and other cosmetic variants
The Slayer helmet provides a 15% strength and 12% accuracy (all combat styles) increase when fighting monsters assigned as your Slayer task. While it offers no combat advantages against non-task creatures, it's the optimal choice during any Slayer assignment. Consider switching to alternative headgear when battling monsters outside your assigned task.
1 used to prioritize ancients for utility.2 used to prioritize healing.

## Vorkath/Strategies
BOSSNAME any relevant text here about the boss prior to requirements

## Requirements 
List any requirements here, including but not limited to: Skill lvls, Prestige requirements.

If no requirements, list recommendations for the above.

## Getting there 
Use the File:Portable portal.pngPortal nexus located north of spawn. Under bosses find .
Travel fee: File:Coins.png COST.

## Mechanics 
Vorkaths Dragonfire is stronger than others i.e Green, Blue, Red, or Black. If you are running the Anti-fire perk you will also need to use protect from magic or use an Anti-fire potion.
Vorkath has two main attacks, his mage attack comes out as a blue ball and the range attack comes out as a spiked green ball. Its recommended to just camp protect from magic. Vorkath also occasionally will shoot out a purple dragonbreath which will de-activate your protection prayers or a green dragonbreath which will venom you if you do not have the resistance, the Antipoison perk will negate this effect.

## Special Attacks

After 6 standard attacks, Vorkath will use one of his special attacks. Upon finishing his special attack the cycle will reset and after another 6 standard attacks he will do another special attack until death.

## Rapid Fire

Rapid Fire is the deadliest of Vorkath's attacks, and is one of the two special attacks it'll use after six standard attacks. When used, Vorkath will launch acid pools around the arena (with one landing on where the player stood), then fire dragonbreath every tick at the tile the player is standing on.

Standing on the acid pools will deal up to 10 damage per tick and heal him for the same amount, whilst getting hit by its rapid dragonfire will result in 25-41 damage taken. As such, the basic principle to surviving this special attack is to always be on the move whilst walking on clean tiles. Players can find a line (at least five tiles free of acid) and walk back and forth said line. This is relatively safe but no damage will be dealt to Vorkath in the
[... 11267 more chars ...]

## World Bosses

## World boss arena
= World Boss Arena =
The World Boss Arena is located to the southeast of  Home. Players can also teleport to this arena by typing ::wb. This arena will house any World and Vote Bosses that spawn in the game. The World Boss Arena is a  World Instance, and as such, items cannot be dropped in this area. Additionally, all loot received while inside the arena will automatically be sent to the player Bank.

## Boss Spawn Mechanics 

## World Boss 
A World Boss is spawned automatically every 6 hours, or once the activity meter reaches 100%, whichever comes first. The activity meter is automatically filled when players complete activities such as voting, gaining levels, and killing NPCs. Voting provides the most progress towards the activity meter.

## Vote Boss 
A Vote Boss is spawned automatically once the vote target has been met. Players can see how many votes are required until the next Vote Boss by typing ::votes. To learn about voting, see  Voting.

## List of Bosses 
The following bosses can spawn in the World Boss Arena. For more detail on each World Boss, see  World Bosses.

## Akkha/Strategies
Akkha is a powerful apparition encountered in the Path of Het, within the Tombs of Amascut raid.

## Requirements 
There are no requirements for Akkha but it is recommended to have Prestige 5 in the combat styles you are using to make the fight as smooth as possible.

## Getting there 
Run northwest of home to the green Tombs of Amascut portal for 150,000 GP and enter the Path of Het

## Mechanics 
Akkha is a tri-brid, high-health raid boss that alternates protection against two combat styles, allowing only one style to damage him at a time. The fight begins with a set combat style rotation: Magic, then Melee, followed by Ranged, repeating this pattern until Akkha's health drops to 20%.

During the encounter, Akkha performs a special attack, which involves a four-part memory game. Players must move to the quadrant of the arena that matches the pattern shown in the memory game to avoid damage.

At 20% health, Akkha spawns three untargetable clones, distinguishable by their green color, while the real Akkha remains brown. In this phase, white orbs appear and travel across the arena, dealing approximately 30 damage each if they hit the player. It is recommended to call your pet through the equipment menu as you run to attack Akkha, maximizing your damage output before he teleports to another position.

## Recommended Talents 
 Melee =
32pxMelee is the recommended combat style to use against Akkha

## Ba-Ba/Strategies
Ba-Ba is a Tier 115 raid boss encountered at the Path of Apmeken within the Tombs of Amascut raid.

## Requirements 
There are no requirements to fight Ba-Ba but it is recommended to have Prestige 5 in your chosen combat style to make the fight as smooth as possible.

## Getting there 
Run northwest of home to the green Tombs of Amascut portal for 150,000 GP and enter the Path of Apmeken

## Mechanics 

## Basic attack 
Ba-Ba's basic attack is melee, so using Protect from melee will reduce its damage.

## Black circles 
Ba-Ba summons a 6x6 square of black circles on the ground. These circles will damage you if you don't move out of their area.

## Falling rocks/Rubble 
Rocks will fall from the ceiling, landing near the player and spreading outward. The fallen rocks create rubble around the edges of the arena.

## Big rock throw 
Ba-Ba hurls a massive rock at the player. To evade the damage, either position yourself near rubble at the arena's edge or start moving toward rubble as Ba-Ba readies his throw.

## Boulders 
When Ba-Ba's health drops to 63% or 36%, he ascends to the top of the arena and unleashes rows of boulders aimed at the player. Focus on the cracked boulders, which can be destroyed by attacking them. Navigate left and right to carve out a safe path and avoid being struck, as the boulders inflict rapid, high-damage hits.

## Recommended talents 
The recommended combat style for BOSSNAME is SKILL.

You won't need too many points to get this boss down. # points are used in this build.

## Bank tags
Bank tags are a suitable way to organise your bank over multiple account's by using a plugin included within the Runelite Client. They allow free editing of your bank space without the need for placeholder's of items you may not have and lets you have gaps to separate sections.

## Using Bank Tags 
Using bank tags is fairly straight forward, allowing you to create your own layouts via ingame adjustments or using an external text editor. You can also just copy/paste a layout you like if you have the bank tags exported code.
*  It is recommended to use bank tags if you are using multiple accounts due to it being a system based on your runelite. This allows all of the bank tags you use to be available on multiple accounts. Whereas bank tabs are simply account-based therefore they do not assist in your other account's banks.

## Creating your own 
Creating your own bank tags is rather simple. All you have to do is click the 'plus' icon that is at the top left of your bank's UI.

File:Bank Tag 1.png

From here you can right click your newly created bank tag and customise it yourself. I would recommend editing the name and icon to the theme of the tag and clicking 'Enable layout'.

frameless

## Importing/Exporting existing tags 
Importing and exporting a bank tag string is rather simple. By using the 'Export tag tab' option from your chosen bank tag's right click menu. Refer to previous image. You will automatically get the bank tag's string copied to your clipboard (copy/paste). From here you can either manually edit the string in your preferred text editor or you can simply import the code as a new bank tag where you require it. To import the code simply right click the 'plus' icon within your bank's UI and 'paste' your chosen string.

frameless

## Adding items to existing tags 
To add an item to any tag there are 2 methods to do so.
# Easy Method: Simply go to your main bank page and drag any item to the bank tag you want to add it to. It will then appear in the tag 
[... 22938 more chars ...]

## Derwen/Strategies
Derwen is the Guthix mage arena guardian. Fighting and defeating him can earn you the File:Guthix_staff.png Guthix staff and the File:Imbued guthix cape.png Imbued guthix cape.

## Requirements 
Recommended: Prestige 3 Magic Level 99+ | Prestige 2-3 Defence Level 99+.

## Getting there 
Use the File:Portable portal.pngPortal nexus located north of spawn. Under bosses find Mage Arena.
Travel fee: File:Coins.png 150k.

## Mechanics 
Derwen will hit with Melee. Use Protect from Melee.
*He will summon lightning which will then strike after a few ticks.
**Move 1 tile; This attack hits in a checkerboard like pattern.
*Derwen will summon Derwimps that will make him invulnerable.
**Use barrage spells to kill them easily.
***A minion or two might be in the wall on the spawn, just move a few tiles and they should be fixed.
**Standing 1 tile south-east of the statue is the best starting location to avoid derwimp wall spawns.

## Recommended talents 
The recommended combat style for Derwen is Magic.

## FAQ
= Frequently Asked Questions =
The August RSPS FAQ is a collection of frequently asked questions to help new and experienced players navigate the game. Whether you're just starting out or looking for specific answers, this page is designed to provide clear and helpful information.

## How do I charge an item? 
Examining an item will provide you with instructions on what items can be used to charge it.

## What do pets do? 
August has two types of pets, Combat pets and Non-combat pets. Skilling pets all provide a 20% XP bonus to their respective skill when following you.

## What is stardust for? 
 Stardust is used to purchase items from the Stardust Store. The store is located west of  Home by the makeover mage.

## How do I get coal dust/granite dust/luminite flux? 

You can use either a hammer, chisel, or mortar and pestle on coal, granite, and luminite ore to get their respective dust forms. 
Nurmof at  Home can also crush ores for you, at the cost of 50  skilling tokens per item crushed. The return is the same as if you crushed them yourself, __you will not receive the experience you would normally gain for crushing them__, however.

## What are sunfire splinters for? 
 Sunfire Splinters are used to charge the  Tonalztics of ralos.

## What is tempering?  
Tempering allows you to sacrifice duplicate items to increase the stats of those items. The  Tempering page has more info about this process.

## How many talent points do I need to unlock a specific tier? 
This is different for each set of talents:  PvM talents,  Skilling talents,  Utility talents.

## How do I repair barrows? 
Barrows items can be repaired at any anvil, under the "Oxi" category.

## How do I get barrows gloves? 
 Barrows gloves can be crafted under the "Oxi" category at any anvil.

## What are tiers? 
Items and enemies have tiers which determine their strength. Most enemies and items can be examined to show their tiers, and will be displayed before the examine text. e.g: "[T90] A pair of upg
[... 2608 more chars ...]

## Gear progression
As new armor and weapons are released, these tables may become outdated and might not reflect the most optimal choices available. The original guide focused primarily on starter-friendly progression.

These gear progression tables are intended as a loose representation of potential upgrade paths for players and should be treated as suggestions rather than definitive rules. They provide a general guideline for equipment priorities but individual circumstances, budget constraints, and personal playstyle may warrant different choices.Always consider your specific goals, available resources, and current game meta when making gearing decisions.

Category:Guides

## General Graardor/Strategies
General Graardor is the goblin general commanding Bandos' army in the God Wars Dungeon.

## Requirements 
No requirements Recommendations:
Prestige 3 Style of your choice and Prestige 2-3+ Defence.

## Getting there 
Use the File:Portable portal.pngPortal nexus located north of spawn. Under bosses find Bandos GWD.
Travel fee: File:Coins.png Free.
Entrance fee: File:Boss token.png 50 boss tokens or 40 killcount

## Mechanics 
General Graardor attacks with Ranged and Melee.
*Freeze Graardor to only get hit with ranged.
**Minions hit you with all 3 Styles of combat.
***Pray ranged so you avoid one combat style completely.
*General Graardor will use a 5x5 tile Area of effect attack, move out of the shadows.

## Recommended talents 
The recommended combat style for General Graardor is Magic.

## Home
In August, the Elven City of Prifddinas is the home city for all players and contains a plethora of useful training areas, utility items, and NPCs that players will be looking for. 

This page will serve as your guide for what you can find within the city, and where.

## Map of August 
Below is a map of August notating the important features. Not everything is identified, but most frequently asked locations/NPC's are marked. The table identifies a few key NPC's worth noting.

left|650px
{| class="wikitable"
|+
!Map Icon
!NPC - Purpose
|-
|center|60x60px
|Masochist - Speak to Masochist to downgrade a masochist account to PVM or Skiller
|-
|center|60x60px
|Seashell Seamus - Trade to view AFK shop
|-
|center|60x60px
|Vote Obelisk - Can view/claim Daily Vote Rewards & can trade to spend Vote Streak Points
|-
|center|60x60px
|Aubrey - Teleport to Dense Essence Mine & can convert Essence Shards into Dense Essence Blocks
|}

## Spawn
right|400px
Located in the center of the city, players will start their journey here. This building, containing the Grand Exchange and surrounding useful NPCs, is considered Home, by most of the player base.

The spawn area is comprised of the following points of interest:

## AFK Zone
The AFK zone is located south of Home. Players can also use the ::afk command to teleport there. The AFK Zone allows for players to train their stats while away from their computer. 

Players inside the AFK zone will not be logged out due to inactivity, and Random Events will not teleport them out.

Players will gain points while inside the AFK zone, and gain double the points if they have an active Vote buff. AFK zone points can be spent at the AFK Store.

The following skills can be trained in the AFK Zone:

* Herblore
* Fishing
* Smithing
* Crafting
* Mining
* Cooking
* Firemaking
* Woodcutting
* Thieving
* Defence
* Hitpoints

## Skilling Areas

## Farming
The Farming area can be found east of Home. Players can also use the Farming teleport in the Portal Nex
[... 2395 more chars ...]

## Justiciar Zachariah/Strategies
Justiciar Zachariah is the Saradomin guardian at the mage arena. He is the only way to obtain the File:Imbued saradomin cape.png Imbued saradomin cape and the File:Saradomin staff.png Saradomin staff.

## Requirements 
None.Recommended Prestige 3 Magic Level 99+ | Prestige 3 Defence level 99+

## Getting there 
Use the File:Portable portal.pngPortal nexus located north of spawn. Under bosses find Mage Arena.
Travel fee: File:Coins.png 150k.

## Mechanics 
Zachariah will hit with all 3 styles.
*Freeze Zachariah with ancient spells, makes this fight very easy.
*Pray Melee until you see an attack with 3 waves; Quickly swap to ranged pray.
**Failure to swap to the correct prayer will disable prayers for a moment and hit you hard.
**You know you prayed correctly if your HP bar is displaying all red.
**Just tank the magic hit and heal through it.

## Recommended talents 
The recommended combat style for Justiciar Zachariah is Magic.

## Kephri/Strategies
## Requirements 
150,000 GP to enter Tombs of Amascut

## Getting there 
From ::home run northwest and enter the green Tombs of Amascut portal.

## Mechanics 
Kephri is a boss where all damage can be avoided. At the start of the fight, use Protect from missiles and run to the southeast corner. Kephri will perform four attacks before creating a dung wall from itself to the edge of the arena. For the rest of the fight, every third attack will be a special attack. After the first dung wall appears, continue dodging Kephri's attacks and prepare for the egg attack—focus on the darker eggs to prevent scarabs from spawning.

Place the second dung wall in the northeast corner and proceed westward around the arena. Once the east side is 'caged,' you can stack the dung walls. At 63% health, Kephri summons two large scarabs: one Ranged and one Melee. Kill the Melee scarab first to prevent it from healing Kephri, then take out the Ranged scarab. At 32% health, Kephri spawns three large scarabs: one each of Melee, Ranged, and Mage. Eliminate the Mage scarab first to avoid its charging magic attack, followed by the Melee and Ranged scarabs. After the second set of large scarabs is defeated, continue fighting Kephri as normal, repeating the same two special attack mechanics.

## Pets
In August, pets offer unique bonuses such as increases XP gains, fighting with you, picking up/burying bones, and increasing your drop rate.

There are three pet slots available:
*"Default" slot
**Unlocked by default
**Used for combat pets, skilling pets, and some utility pets before their upgrades
*"Skilling" slot
**Unlocked via Item sacrifice
**Can only be used for Skilling pets
*"Utility" slot
**Unlocked by default
**Used for Utility pets

Note that talents such as Guardian and Bloodworm do not take up these slots.

## Combat Pets
In August, combat pets have the ability to attack, with their combat abilities and styles based on the boss they were dropped from.

Combat pets are affected by the following talents:

## Porazdir/Strategies
Porazdir is the the Demon boss in the Mage arena. He is your only way of getting File:Imbued zamorak cape.pngImbued Zamorak Cape and File:Zamorak staff.pngZamorak staff the best-in-slot magic special attack weapon, paired with File:Sigil of finality.png Sigil of Finality.

## Requirements 
None. Recommended Prestige 3 20px level 99+, Prestige 2-3 20px level 99+. 

Minimum recommended talent points: 101

## Getting there 
Use the File:Portable portal.pngPortal nexus located north of spawn. Under bosses find Mage Arena and step through the sparkling water.
Travel fee: File:Coins.png 200k. This cost can be free with the tier 3 utility talent File:Teleportation haggler.png Teleportation Haggler.

## Mechanics 
To spawn the boss pray at the Statue of Zamorak
* Porazdir will attack with melee. 
**We counter this by freezing him with Ancient magicks and praying protect Melee.
* Porazdir has 2 special attacks: 
**When he spawns a shield in front of him he will then use an area attack on the square you're standing on. 
***To counter this you must move at least 2 tiles away.
**Porazdir will throw a Red Skull at the player and begin to say "Porazdir grows tired of how you cling to your gods!"
***Disable protection prayers, your hp bar will look like you have 1 hp, but you're fine.
*Step away from him if he gets too close and re-freeze.

## Recommended talents 
The recommended combat style for Porazdir is Magic.

You won't need too many points to get this boss down. 101 points are used in this build.

## Scurrius/Strategies
Scurrius is an entry-level boss aimed at introducing players to common mechanics that are found in bossing, namely switching protection prayers, dodging falling objects, and dealing with additional mobs during the fight. It also consists of multiple phases that have slightly altered mechanics.

He rarely drops the Scurrius' spine, a unique item used in the creation of useful weapons for each combat style: The Bone mace, Bone shortbow and Bone staff. These weapons can be tempered, and also can be equipped with no requirements, making them effective in training combat skills after Prestige.

## Requirements 
None.

Recommended: Level 43 alt=Prayer Icon|20x20px Prayer for protection prayers against each style.

## Getting there 
Use the File:Portable_portal.pngPortal nexus located north of spawn. Under Bossing (Early-game) find Scurrius.

Travel fee: File:Coins.png None.

## Quick Guide 

* Phase 1 (100%-80% HP): Protect from Melee and dodge Rockfall.

* Healing phases: Scurrius heals at a food pile and may use Magic, Ranged, Rockfall, or summon rats. He does not use melee while eating.
* Summoned rats: Kill them quickly. Bone weapons attack rats every tick and instantly kill them.

* Phase 2 (80%-40% HP): Similar to Phase 1, but rats can now be summoned outside of healing phases.
* Phase 3 (below 30% HP): Scurrius attacks faster and uses Magic, Ranged, Rockfall, and Summons.

## Mechanics 
Scurrius attacks with all three combat styles. Scurrius additionally has some special abilities.

## Attacks 

* Melee: Scurrius spins and swipes with his tail, dealing damage immediately.
** Protect from Melee before he starts this attack.

* Magic: Scurrius flickers with a blue light and sends a bolt of blue lightning towards the player.
** Protect from Magic before the projectile hits.

* Ranged: Scurrius nods sideways and sends a green bundle of furballs towards the player.
** Protect from Ranged before the projectile hits.

## Specials 

* Rockfall: Scurrius jumps up and down, 
[... 3176 more chars ...]

## Server Rules
A note about the rules: These rules are updated first and foremost on our official Discord. 
In the event of any discrepencies between the ruleset on this Wiki and the Discord, readers should default to the Discord ruleset.

## Rule 1: Scamming

## Rule 1a: Trade Scamming
All trade agreements must be honoured. Changing an offer after an agreement is made constitutes trade scamming and is not tolerated. Always double-check the offer before proceeding. If you believe you have been scammed, please submit a Player-Report ticket in #tickets on Discord. 

Note: Repeated exploitation of this rule will result in more severe penalties

## Rule 1b: Reporting Scams
To report a scam, please submit a Player-Report ticket in #tickets on Discord.

## Rule 1c: Price Manipulation
Engaging in any form of price manipulation is strictly prohibited. This includes artificially inflating or deflating item prices for personal gain at the expense of others.
Price manipulation is considered unfair, dishonest, and goes against the spirit of the game.

## Rule 2: Real World Trading (RWT)
Trades are limited to August Items/GP for August Items/GP only. Any attempts to trade for items or currency outside this scope will result in a ban, and the items involved will be removed.

Note: Suggesting or attempting such trades will also result in a ban. There are no exceptions.

## Rule 3: Bug Abuse & Exploitation
Exploiting bugs, glitches, or unintended game mechanics for personal gain is prohibited. Report any bugs immediately using a Bug Report ticket in #tickets on Discord.

Note: Do not repeat the exploit or share information about the bug with non-staff members. Violations will result in penalties, including stat resets or removal of items gained through exploitation.

## Rule 4: Macroing & Botting (Automation)
Using third-party clients, software, or tools to gain an unfair advantage, such as auto-typing, auto-clicking, mouse recorders, auto switchers, and auto alchers, is strictly forbidden.

Note
[... 7869 more chars ...]

## Skilling outfit
## General Info
August has a number of skilling outfits, obtained primarily from the Skilling Token Store. These skilling outfits provide a number of bonuses.

The effects of all of these outfits can be provided by the Ring of 3rd age, without requiring the sets to be worn.

## Set Effects
Each skilling outfit piece provides an XP bonus when worn, up to the maximum set effect listed below.

Category:Guides

## Starter guide
=Introduction=

Welcome to August!

August is a blend of custom content and league inspired features that we are positive everyone will find enjoyment in. But, in that same vein, we understand it can be a bit daunting to learn all that August has to offer.

So, this Starter Guide was born. There is too much content to possibly cover on this page, but this starter guide will give you some useful jumping off points as you start your journey.

=Tips=
For my short attention spam folks, these tips will get you going without needing to read through my monologue.

# There is a visual aide to help you get accustomed to the Spawn area of August - Visit the Home page to see it!
# Use the ::starter and ::refer codes to claim your starter packs!
#* Make sure to use the Rank Book to rank up to Sapphire Donator rank, which offers some nice QoL benefits.
# Vote for August using the ::vote command for bonus goodies and a 12 hour buff granting extra drop rate, bonus XP, and more!
# Use ::2fa and ::setpin commands to protect your account, and gain a further 3% bonus to your drop rate!
# Familiarise yourself with the Talent Trees and the Prestige System! Talents are your #1 source of power in August.
# Claim rewards for your Achievements! And don't forget to check back in on them regularly to claim any new rewards you earn.
# Review the FAQ for some frequently asked questions
# When registering your account, you can use the same email address for multiple accounts. No need to create new emails!
# Check out the Guides category. These player-created guides will help you navigate content like Bossing.

=Written Guide=
For those of you looking for a more in-depth guide, this is for you. This is absolutely not the most *efficient* method to the game, but I also think efficiency is the thief of joy. 
Experiment! Try things out! Have fun!

## Your First (or second) Decision
If you're reading this, you've probably already left the Tutorial and picked your game mode.

If not, go read Game mode
[... 5978 more chars ...]

## Tempering
thumb|The tempering bench in the crafting area at home.
Tempering is a game mechanic in August that allows you to increase the power of your tiered equipment, by sacrificing duplicate copies of a piece of gear.

To tell if a piece of equipment is tiered, examine it, and it will show a level in brackets in the examine text (For example, Diamond legs say "[T95] I feel like I'd be pretty safe in this", indicating the item is tier 95).

## How To 
In order to temper a piece of gear, head to the Tempering Bench in the crafting area by running south of home, or using the ::afk command in-game.
thumb|The tempering interface shown when selecting an item to temper.
Once in the tempering interface, select an item from your inventory, and you'll have the option to temper it, sacrificing a duplicate copy of that item from your inventory to provide a scaling bonus to the offensive and defensive stats provided by the item.

Note: The stat increases of the item won't show on the tooltip when you hover over the item, they will however appear on the stats screen for your character.

## Stat Increases 
Items can be tempered up to 15 times each, with each temper providing an additional increase in stats:
{| class="wikitable"
! Rank
! Stat Increase %
! Items For Level
! Total Items
! Upgrade Gems Per Level
! Total Gems

|-

|-
| 3 || 30.32 || 1 || 3 || 0 || 0
|-
| 4 || 34.95 || 2 || 5 || 5,000 || 5,000
|-
| 5 || 38.78 || 2 || 7 || 10,000 || 15,000
|-
| 6 || 42.21 || 2 || 9 || 15,000 || 30,000
|-
| 7 || 45.43 || 4 || 13 || 25,000 || 55,000
|-

## Thermonuclear smoke devil/Strategies
Thermonuclear smoke devil Also known as " Thermy " is a boss version of Smoke devil

## Requirements 
The only requirement to kill Thermonuclear smoke devil is 80 Slayer

## Getting there 
Use the File:Portable portal.pngPortal nexus located north of spawn. Under bosses find Thermonuclear smoke devil

## Mechanics 
Nothing too hard about this boss use your preferred combat style and pray ranged. Thermonuclear smoke devil occasionally drops 1 dose prayer potions but I would still bring some spare prayer potions or super restores just in case you get unlucky on supply drops. Using the Berserker talent will increase xp and kills per hour.

## Recommended talents 
Recommended combat style for Thermonuclear smoke devil is whatever style you want experience in.

You can fill in the talents as you get them this is a very beginner friendly boss

## Transmog mode
A feature available to all Donators, Transmog mode allows a player to change the appearance of their character without changing their currently equipped gear. 

Putting items into your "transmog" equipment tab is entirely cosmetic, meaning none of the stats of your transmog gear will affect gameplay*.
* There are a few exceptions to this rule. See the Exceptions for a comprehensive list.

## How to
right|200px

To enable Transmog Mode, players must be at Home. Players can open the equipment tab and click the Transmog button to toggle the Transmog feature.

Once enabled, players can equip items into their Transmog slots. These items will act as a cosmetic override to any equipment worn. If no equipment is worn in the tramsogged slot, the transmog override will not appear.
* If you have a helmet equipped in your Transmog helmet slot, but are not wearing a helmet in your "real" equipment slot, it will appear you are not wearing a helmet.

When finished, click the Transmog button once more to confirm your changes and toggle the system back off.

## Exceptions
The Ring of 3rd age will work when equipped in the ring transmog slot.
Sage's greaves will work when equipped in the boot transmog slot.

## Weaknesses
A number of NPCs now have weaknesses to certain types of attack styles.

When exploiting a weakness of an NPC, by using the appropriate attack style(s) (NPCs can have many weaknesses), there will be two bonus effects: Depending on how weak the NPC is to that type:

* You will gain up to 10 extra min hit. 50% stab weakness = +5 min hit.
* You will bypass a certain amount of damage mitigation, meaning you can more effectively fight higher level/tier enemies.

## Zalcano/Strategies
Zalcano is a demon underneath Prifddinas. Players must use their gathering (Mining) and crafting (Smithing, Runecrafting) skills to defeat her.

She is a source of Crystal shards and Crystal tool seeds, among a range of skilling resources. She is the only source of the rare Third age upgrade kit which is required to craft third age tools.

## Requirements 
Any pickaxe (toolbelt works)

Recommended: Decent 24x24px Hitpoints level to survive a hit from the red circles

## Getting there 
Use the File:Portable portal.pngPortal nexus located north of spawn. Under Bosses (Early-game) find Zalcano.
Travel fee: File:Coins.png None.

## Mechanics 
The Zalcano fight is split into shield phases and mining phases, determined by her remaining HP:

* 100%: Shield
* 80%: Mining
* 65%: Shield
* 45%: Mining
* 30%: Shield
* 10%: Mining

Shield Phase

The only way to damage Zalcano in this phase is to use Imbued tephra. Making it is a three step process.

Perks that buff Gathering and Crafting do work and are very useful here.  Mined tephra may be instantly refined with processing perks, skipping step 2.

# Mine Tephra from a Rock formation. One formation will be Glowing, which has a much better rate of gathering
# Smelt Tephra into Refined tephra at the Furnace (coloured red)
# Imbue Refined tephra into Imbued tephra at the Altar (coloured blue)

Zalcano has abilities that will either help or hinder you during this phase.

* Uses Magic to attack the currently glowing rock formation, which will damage players next to it.
* Uses Magic to summon a Golem. The golem will run towards Zalcano and heal her for their current HP.
** Golems can be damaged with Imbued tephra to reduce the amount they heal.
** Throwing  just one Imbued tephra at a Golem will cause it to drop large amounts of Imbued tephra even if it reaches Zalcano.
** You should always prioritise attacking a golem if you lack enough Imbued tephra to complete the phase.
* Summons large glowing circles in a random formation across
[... 1214 more chars ...]

## Zebak/Strategies
Zebak is a large crocodile encountered at the  the Path of Crondis, within the Tombs of Amascut.

## Requirements 
There are no requirements to fight Zebak but it is recommended to have Prestige 5 in your chosen combat style to make the fight as smooth as possible.

## Getting there 
Run northwest of home to the green Tombs of Amascut portal for 150,000 GP and enter the Path of Crondis

## Mechanics 
Zebak is a high-health raid boss known for alternating between ranged and magic attacks. The fight involves several mechanics that demand precise movement and positioning to successfully navigate. From the start of the encounter, Zebak uses his basic attacks. One of these is a rock attack, signaling a ranged strike—activate Protect from Ranged to avoid damage. The other is a red orb attack, indicating a magic strike—use Protect from Magic to avoid damage. 

## Cluster of red orbs 
Zebak summons a swarm of red orbs that chase you. If they catch up to you, they inflict damage and heal Zebak in the process. To avoid this, keep moving to evade the orbs while maintaining your attacks on Zebak.

## Sand attack/Waves 
Zebak covers the entire arena with sand, which deals damage if you step on it. To counter this, attack the boulders scattered around the arena to clear the sand and create safe zones. These cleared areas are also essential for dodging the waves that sweep in from either side of the arena. Throughout this phase, Zebak will continue using his basic attacks, so continue to swap prayers accordingly.

## Charged up attack 
Zebak unleashes another wave of damaging sand, accompanied by three rock walls and scattered boulders throughout the arena. To create a safe zone, push or pull the boulders and attack them when they are in position to create the safe zone behind a wall. Position yourself one-two tiles behind a wall to shield yourself from Zebak's arena-wide attack. During this phase, Zebak also continues to use his basic attacks, so swap prayers accordingly.

## Black mask
48px|left The Black mask is a rare drop from Cave horrors, providing a small damage boost to all 3 combat styles when worn versus your current Slayer task.

## Combat Stats
 

## Special Passive Effect
The Black mask provides a 6.5% increase to slayer accuracy and a 8.1% increase to slayer strength with all styles of combat when worn and attacking your assigned slayer task.This can be further increased with the 20px Pointy Helmet tier 4 skilling talent.

## Bonecrusher
50px The Bonecrusher is a utility item that, when carried in the inventory, can automatically crush the bones of killed monsters. The Bonecrusher must be charged with PVM tokens, and the bonecrushing effect can be toggled on and off.

## Talent Synergies

The Bonecrusher offers 50% of the regular XP of burying bones. The Bonecrusher can be paired with the Tier 2 Utility Talent Bone Crusher++ for increased XP.

The Tier 6 Utility Talent Utility Unleashed can be used to boost the effectiveness of the Bonecrusher while in your inventory.

## Bottomless Overload
50px|left The Bottomless Overload is a bottomless version of the Overload potion. The Bottomless Overload boosts all the player's combat stats by 5 + (level * 0.15), while damaging them for 50 hitpoints. 

This damage is applied in hits of 10 over a few ticks. The stat boost is re-applied every 15 seconds for five minutes until the effects wear off, at which point the player is healed back 50 hitpoints. The Bottomless Overload is tradeable.

## Divine artisan flask
50px|leftThe divine artisan flask is a potion that boosts the player's crafting success rate by 10%. The divine artisan flask effect will last for 10 minutes. This effect pauses if the player is logged out. 

The divine artisan flask is tradeable.

## Divine combat xp flask
50px|leftThe Divine combat xp flask is a potion that boosts the player's combat experience gained by 20%. The divine artisan flask effect will last for 12 hours. This effect pauses if the player is logged out. The divine combat xp flask is tradeable. 

The divine combat xp flask bonus is additive to the Combat xp token bonus.

## Divine luck flask
50px|leftThe Divine luck flask is a potion that boosts the player's drop rate percentage by 5%. The divine luck flask effect will last for 2 hours. This effect pauses if the player is logged out. The Divine luck flask is tradeable. 

The Divine luck flask effect is stackable with other drop rate bonuses, such as the 3% Account security bonus, and the Tier 4 Skilling Talent Task Treasure.

## Divine skilling xp flask
50px|leftThe Divine skilling xp flask is a potion that boosts the player's skilling experience gained by 20%. The divine artisan flask effect will last for 12 hours. This effect pauses if the player is logged out. The divine skilling xp flask is tradeable. 

The divine skilling xp flask bonus is additive to the Skilling xp token bonus.

## Dossier
50px|left 

There are 9 different contracts that a player can receive from the Dossier:

* Contract of glyphic attenuation
* Contract of sensory clouding
* Contract of bloodied blows
* Contract of divine severance
* Contract of forfeit breath
* Contract of oathplate acquisition
* Contract of shard acquisition
* Contract of harmony acquisition
* Contract of familiar acquisition

50px|left The Dwarven rock cake can be eaten an unlimited number of times to deal 9 damage to yourself. It can be upgraded to a Zaryte rock cake, which deals 69 damage per hit. The damage from rock cakes cannot kill you.

## Essence shards
50px|left Essence shards can be mined from the essence mine by speaking to Aubery at Home. These shards can then be used in some crafting recipes, or turned in for dense essence blocks for training Runecrafting.

## Eternal bracelet of slaughter
50px|left The Eternal bracelet of slaughter is a bracelet that when worn, grants a 25% chance for a Slayer task kill to not count as a kill towards the task, but still grants the appropriate Slayer experience. The eternal bracelet of slaughter is not tradeable.

This effect is the inverse of the Eternal expeditious bracelet.

## Eternal expeditious bracelet
50px|left The Eternal expeditious bracelet is a bracelet that when worn, grants a 25% chance for a monster killed to count as two kills towards the Slayer task, without granting additional Slayer experience. The eternal expeditious bracelet is not tradeable.

This effect is the inverse of the Eternal bracelet of slaughter.

## Ethereal Essence
50px|left Ethereal Essence is required to smith T70 (Oxi) tier items, including repairing Barrows armor, crafting Barrows gloves and Oxi Defenders.

In addition to the below listed item sources, you can gain Ethereal Essence from breaking down broken Barrows armor with a hammer or mortar and pestle.

## Herb sack
50px The Herb sack is a utility item that, when carried in the inventory, will automatically bank dropped herbs. The Herb sack must be charged with Skilling tokens, and the banking effect can be toggled on and off.

## Talent Synergies

The Tier 1 Utility Talent Nature's Vault can be used in place of the Herb sack.

left|50px The Herbal mixture is a potion that can be created at the Alchemy table by combining the Herbal mixture (unf) and Lily of the sands.

The Herbal mixture is then used to craft Fertilizing mixture at the Alchemy table.

## Holy scythe of vitur
left|64px
The Holy scythe of vitur is a tier 120 melee weapon.

## Combat stats

## Passive Effect
Hits 3 times with each attack, with your second and third hits doing damage equal to 33% and 15% of your max hit respectively.

In addition, 15% of your prayer bonus (rounded down) is added to your max hit.

## Imbued heart (ma)
50px|leftThe Imbued heart (ma) boosts the player's Magic and Defence level by 3 + (level * 0.15) for 7 minutes. 

Unlike the Bottomless Overload, the Imbued heart (ma) does not damage the player when using it. The Imbued heart (ma) is tradeable.

## Monster parts
50px|left50px50px Monster parts are required for crafting Slayer helmet (i)s, and Slayer mystery boxes. Monster parts are the middle of the three tiers of monster parts. 

Monster parts also come in a Basic and Superior tier.

After creating your Slayer Helm (i), Monster parts are frequently used to create slayer mystery boxes (by using the parts on each other in your inventory) after prestiging Slayer, as they provide Slayer experience when doing so, allowing you to skip low Slayer levels.

= Item Sources =

## Drops 

= Item Uses =

## Products 
The following recipes can be made with this item:

{| class="wikitable sortable"

|-
| 32px || Slayer mystery box || 20px 1 || 80% || class="plainlist" | 3 x Monster part (I)3 x Monster part (II)3 x Monster part (III)75 x Upgrade gems
|-
| 32px || Slayer helmet (i) || 20px 5520px 55 || 100% || class="plainlist" | 1 x Slayer helmet1 x Slayer helm imbue scroll10 x Monster part (I)10 x Monster part (II)10 x Monster part (III)5 x Superior monster part (I)5 x Superior monster part (II)5 x Superior monster part (III)1,000 x Upgrade gems
|}

## Olympian fabric
50px|left Olympian fabric is a resource used to craft high tier magic armour.

It is primarily sourced from Olympian Raids, however, can also be crafted for a high price at the loom.

## Omni heart
50px|left The Omni heart is a combination item of the three Imbued hearts; the Imbued heart (ma), the Imbued heart (me), and the Imbued heart (r). The Omni heart provides all bonuses of the three Imbued hearts for 10 minutes.

## Overload heart
50px|left The Overload heart is a combination item consisting of the three Imbued hearts; the Imbued heart (ma), the Imbued heart (me), the Imbued heart (r), and the Bottomless Overload. The Overload heart boosts provides a larger buff than the Imbued hearts, boosting all the player's combat stats by 5 + (level * 0.20) for 10 minutes and does not damage the player. The Overload heart is not tradeable.

## Part parceler
50px The Part parceler is a utility item that, when carried in the inventory, can automatically send Slayer mystery boxes and monster parts to the player's bank. The Part parceler must be charged with PVM tokens, and the banking effect can be toggled on and off.

## Item Sources

## Drops

! Dropped From !! Loot Table Name !! Number Dropped

| Community mystery box || Less Rare (1/25) || 1

|-
| Heroic Mystery Crate || Uncommon (1/3) || 1
|-

50pxThe Ring of 3rd age is a ring that offers a 12% XP bonus while worn, and acts as a replacement for all Skilling outfits.

## Passive Effect
Hits 3 times with each attack, with your second and third hits doing damage equal to 33% and 15% of your max hit respectively.

In addition, when you have 0 prayer remaining, you will gain a 4th hit equal to 15% of your max hit.

## Seed box
50px The Seed box is a utility item that, when carried in the inventory, can automatically bank dropped seeds. The Seed box must be charged with Skilling tokens, and the banking effect can be toggled on and off.

## Talent Synergies

The Tier 1 Utility Talent Nature's Vault can be used in place of the Herb sack.

## Shard of insurance
50px|leftThe Shard of insurance is a consumable item that, if in the inventory, is consumed when a crafting recipe is attempted. 

The shard will be consumed instead of losing any materials when a craft is failed. The shard will also be consumed on a successful craft.

## Steel key ring
left|50px The Steel key ring is a utility item that, when carried in the inventory, can automatically pick up crystal key halves. The Steel key ring must be charged with coins (25,000 per charge), and the pickup effect can be toggled on and off.

This item is a less complete version of the Tier 2 Utility Talent Key Master's Vault

## Talent Synergies

The Tier 6 Utility Talent Utility Unleashed gives the steel key ring up to a 10% chance to double dropped key halves.

## Superior monster parts
50px|left50px50px Superior monster parts are required for crafting Slayer helmet (i)s, and Superior slayer mystery boxes. Superior monster parts are the highest of the three tiers of monster parts.

After creating your Slayer Helm (i), Superior monster parts are frequently used to create slayer mystery boxes (by using the parts on each other in your inventory) after prestiging Slayer, as they provide Slayer experience when doing so, allowing you to skip low Slayer levels.

= Item Sources =

## Drops 

= Item Uses =

|}

## Thread
50px|left Thread is a basic crafting resource, required for crafting low level mage and ranged armor.

Thread can be purchased from shops, but the easiest source of thread for slayer locked ironman accounts is likely spinning it on the spinning wheel in the AFK area from bowstrings.

## Titanforged maul
left|64px
The Titanforged maul is a tier 110 melee weapon. It must be charged before it can be used.

## Combat stats

## Special attack
{| class="wikitable"
! Special Attack !! Attack Effect !! Special Cost
|-
| Olympic Slam || Channel the power of Hephaestus and devastate enemies in a 5x5 range around you. || 50%
|}

## Passive Effect
Attacks with this weapon hurl a fireball at up to 3 additional targets while fighting in a multi combat area. These fireballs hit up to 20% of your base max hit. Experience is granted based on the damage done by the fireballs, in addition to the primary weapon hit.

## Charges

## Wealth collector
50px The Wealth collector is a utility item that, when carried in the inventory, can automatically pick up all currencies. The Wealth collector does not need to be charged, and the pickup effect can be toggled on and off. The Wealth collector is tradeable.

## Talent Synergies

The Tier 2 Utility Talent Treasure Goblin's Vault can be used in place of the Wealth collector

The Tier 6 Utility Talent Utility Unleashed can be used to boost the effectiveness of the Wealth collector while in your inventory.

## Zenyte
50px|left Zenyte is a cut version of an Uncut zenyte. It is used to make Zenyte jewelery.

Cut zenytes can also be stolen from the zenyte stall with a Diamond donator rank, however, they are very rare, and it may take multiple hours to receive a single gem.

Category:Lootboxes

## Account security
Account security is paramount to August, and while security is the player's responsibility, August wants to reward players that take the time to secure their accounts.

Players can gain an increased global drop rate buff of 3% by setting a bank pin and 2-Factor authentication.

## Bank Pin
A Bank Pin can be set by typing ::setpin in-game. To change a bank pin, type ::changepin.

## 2-Factor Authentication
2-Factor Authentication can be set by typing ::2fa in-game.

To setup 2-Factor Authentication you will need to scan the QR code on the setup page with your chosen authenticator app. 

Examples of authenticator apps include Microsoft Authenticator, Google Authenticator, and Authy.

## References

## Axes
August has a number of custom axes with unique perks.

## Bronze to Rune axes
Bronze through Rune axes work as normal, all able to be purchased at the Skilling Tools Store at home. These tools do not have any perks.

## Shops

## Gatherer axe
50px The gatherer axe has the double yield perk, providing a small chance to gather two of a resource each time you harvest. It is roughly equivalent to a Rune axe in speed, and has a woodcutting level requirement of 1.

## Shops
The gatherer axe can be purchased at the Skilling Token Store at home.

## Dragon axe
50pxThe dragon axe doesn't have any perks, but is a required stepping stone if looking to craft your own 3rd age axe. It has a woodcutting level requirement of 61. 

## Drops
The dragon axe drops from the following enemies:

{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Dropped From !! Quantity !! Drop Table
|-
| Zalcano || 1 || Rare (1/64)
|-
| King Black Dragon || 1 || Rare (1/512)
|-
| Steel dragon || 1 || Super rare (1/4096)
|-
| Black dragon || 1 || Super rare (1/4096)
|-
| Iron dragon || 1 || Super rare (1/4096)
|-
| Red dragon || 1 || Super rare (1/4096)
|-
| Bronze dragon || 1 || Super rare (1/4096)
|-
| Blue dragon || 1 || Super rare (1/4096)
|-
| Green dragon || 1 || Super rare (1/5120)
|}

## Infernal axe
|50pxThe infernal axe has the process resource perk, and must be crafted using a smoldering stone and dragon axe. It has a level requirement of 61 woodcutting. 

## Drops
The smoldering stone required for crafting the infernal axe drops from the following enemies:

{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Source !! Quantity !! Drop Table
|-
| Cerberus || 1 || Rare (1/64)
|-
| Ignis || 1 || Rare (1/42)
|-
| Hellhound || 1 || Mega Rare
|}

## Recipe

## Crystal axe
|50pxThe crystal axe has the speed perk, and must be crafted using a crystal tool seed, crystal shards, and a dragon axe. It has a level requirement of 71 woodcutting.

The crystal tool seed can either be purchased from the Skilling Token Store or dropped from Zalcano.

[... 709 more chars ...]

## References

## Bond
50px
Not to be confused with a Rank book, Bonds are tradeable items that can be obtained by Donating, as a rare drop from NPCs, or won as a reward from certain events. 

Bonds can redeemed towards your Donator rank and awards Donator credits once redeemed, which can be spent at the Donator store.

## Sources
For information on which NPCs can drop Bonds, see their respective pages.

! !! Link
|-
| File:$1_bond.png
|$1 Bond
|-
|File:$5_bond.png
|$5 Bond
|-
|File:$10_bond.png
|$10 Bond
|-
|File:$25_bond.png
|$25 Bond
|-
|File:$50_bond.png
|$50 Bond
|}

## Clues
Clues are pretty cool, you queue em, then you open em, then you get items. Sometimes good, sometimes bad, much like life.

fart

! colspan="2" | !! Clue Scroll !! Clue Casket !! Time to Complete !! Points Rewarded

| 32px || 32px || Hard clue scroll || Hard casket || 3 hours || 30

| 32px || 32px || Elite clue scroll || Elite casket || 6 hours || 40
|-
| 32px || 32px || Master clue scroll || Master casket || 12 hours || 50
|}

## Coal dust
50px|leftCoal dust is the product of crushing Coal with a hammer. Coal dust flux is used in many crafting recipes, and is also the secondary ingredient in low tier Smithing.

## References
Category:Slayer monsters

## Collection log
The Collection log is a feature in game which tracks your player's natively obtained items (from drops, gathering, or crafting).

## Combatant Scroll
64px|left
Combatant scroll is an item obtained by unlocking the Perfect Scurrius achievement in the Paragon League event. 

The player is given the Combatant benefit, which allows the following:
* Select three combat skills (from Attack, Strength, Defence, Hitpoints, Ranged, Magic, or Prayer).
* Whenever the player gains XP in one of those three skills, they will gain 50% of that XP in the other 2 selected skills as well.

The choices are permanent.

## Contracts
Contracts (or Yama contracts) are rewards from Dossiers, and are rarely awarded when killing Yama.

Each contract has a different effect, increasing the difficulty of the Yama fight in exchange for guaranteed rewards.

## List of contracts 

Note: in addition to the below effect of all contracts, the Sage's axe and drop tokens are ineffective vs Yama in all contracts. 

{| class="wikitable sortable sticky-header align-center-5 align-center-8" style="text-align:center;"
!colspan=2 | Contract
!Duo partnerallowed
!Returnedon kill
!Details
!Guaranteed Reward
|-
|32px
|Contract of shard acquisition
|Yes
|No
|Yama can spawn enhanced voidflares.

Yama can cast enhanced incantations.

Challenger will regain 50% less prayer and health.

|Oathplate shards x 45
|-
|32px
|Contract of oathplate acquisition
|No
|No
|Yama can spawn enhanced voidflares.
Yama can cast enhanced incantations.

Challenger will regain 50% less prayer and health.

Challenger must be alone.
|Oathplate armour piece x 1
|-
|32px
|Contract of harmony acquisition
|No
|No
|Yama can spawn enhanced voidflares.
Yama can cast enhanced incantations.

Challenger will regain 50% less prayer and health.

Challenger must be alone.
|Soulflame horn x 1
|-
|32px
|Contract of forfeit breath
|No
|Yes
|Yama drains Challenger's stamina passively.
Yama drains Challenger's stamina on dealing damage.

Challenger loses upon reaching 0 stamina.

Challenger must be alone.
|Purifying sigil (top) x 1
|-
|32px
|Contract of glyphic attenuation
|No
|Yes
|Glyphs protect you for less time, and are more punishing.

Yama is now weak to crush, and nothing else.

Challenger's prayer bonus affects their drain rate inversely.

Challenger's prayer bonus increases the damage they deal.

Challenger must be alone.
|Purifying sigil (bottom) x 1
|-
|32px
|Contract of sensory clouding
|No
|Yes
|Yama's attacks have increased prayer penetration.

Yama can pursue forever.

Voidflare explosions are lethal.

Challenger has 50% reduced attack range.

Challe
[... 853 more chars ...]

## Corrupted AFK scroll
50px The Corrupted AFK scroll is a tradeable item received from voting. When used, the scroll will give the players 2 hours of entry to the Corrupted AFK zone.

## Craftsman Scroll
64px|left
Craftsman scroll is an item obtained after unlocking the Craftsman achievement in the Paragon League event.

The player is given the Craftsman benefit, which allows the following:
* Select three artisan skills (from Cooking, Crafting, Firemaking, Fletching, Herblore, Runecrafting, and Smithing).
* Whenever the player gains XP in one of those three skills, they will gain 50% of that XP in the other 2 selected skills as well.

The choices are permanent.

## Crystal chest
The Crystal chest is a chest that can be opened to receive various items. It can be opened with a Crystal key.

The Crystal chest is located in the long "loot chest building" to the west of the main Home building.

## Crystal of memories
left|50px The Crystal of memories are a pair of boots obtained from the Tier 4 Utility Talent Last Recall.

The Crystal of memories will remember the last location the player teleported from, and can teleport the player back.

Note: If teleporting out of an instance, the orb will teleport you to the same location as if you died in the instance. This is generally just outside of the entrance.

Category:Lootboxes

## Donator zone
Within August there are three donator zones available, each offering exclusive training locations.

## 32pxDonator Zone
Restricted to File:emeraldicon.pngEmerald donators and above, the donator zone is made up of multiple locations throughout August in which donators can train specific skills. Delineated by their blue barrier, donator zone locations exist as restricted areas near the standard training locations for those skills.

## 32pxCorrupt Donator Zone
Restricted to File:diamondicon.pngDiamond donators and above, the corrupt donator zone is made up of multiple locations throughout August in which donators can train specific skills. Delineated by their red barrier, donator zone locations exist as restricted areas near the standard training locations for those skills.

## 32pxDragonstone Donator Zone
Restricted to File:dragonstoneicon.pngDragonstone donators and above, the Dragonstone donator zone, commonly known as the DDZ, is the first standalone donator zone in August. Players can get to the DDZ by using the command ::ddz, or running west from home.

## Daily training spots
The DDZ offers multiple training spots, with the use of these spots capped by the number of DDZ interaction points you are allotted. 
Depending on your donator rank, players are given a set amount of interactions, starting at 1000. Every successful interaction will reduce your gather point allotment by 1. 

Training skills within the DDZ zone will grant DDZ points, which can be exchanged at the DDZ store for rewards. The following training spots are available inside the DDZ:

Note that all of the above training spots obey the standard number of actions per click, up to 75 with a maxed out Persistent Gatherer talent.

## DDZ slayer task area
The DDZ slayer task area offers a private NPC spawning area, to spawn monsters for your slayer task that only you can see, with auto-banking of drops. Speaking to the Dragonstone Sage will allow you to configure how many enemies spawn at once, and the ma
[... 904 more chars ...]

## Enhanced crystal chest
The Enhanced crystal chest is a chest that can be opened to receive various items. It can be opened with an Enhanced crystal key.

The Enhanced crystal chest is located in the long "loot chest building" to the west of the main Home building.

## Fertilizing mixture
left|50px The Fertilizing mixture is a potion that can be created at the Alchemy table by combining the Herbal mixture and Scarab dung.

When held in the inventory, players will gain 1 extra product per Farming harvest while harvesting crops.

## References
Category:Slayer monsters

## Gatherer Scroll
64px|left
Gatherer scroll is obtained after unlocking the Gatherer achievement in the Paragon League event. 

The player is given the Gatherer benefit, which allows the following:
* Select three gathering or support skills (from Mining, Fishing, Woodcutting, Farming, Slayer, and Thieving).
* When you gain experience in one of your three selected skills you'll gain 50% of that experience in the other two skills.

The choices are permanent.

## Gauntlet chest
The Gauntlet chest can be opened with Gauntlet keys and Gauntlet key (rare)s, rewarded from completion of the regular Gauntlet.

Precondition: Requirement: Common Gauntlet key

## Gem beast
Gem beasts are an unique set of Slayer monsters available in August. Assignable only by Nixite, players can receive gem beast assignments starting at level 80 Slayer. 

Gem beasts are popular for mid-level players due to their armour and weapon sets. Nearly all gem beasts can be easily dispatched by using Protect from Melee to negate all incoming damage, with the exception being Dragonstone Drakes.

## Sapphire Beast
32pxStarting at level 80 Slayer, players can receive Sapphire Beast tasks from Nixite. 

## Armour
32pxComprised of the Sapphire helm, Sapphire body, and Sapphire legs, the Sapphire armour set requires level 80 Defence to wear. Sapphire armour, although weaker in individual stats to other Tier 80 armours, provides a tribrid attack benefit to all combat styles, giving it the tradeoff of being useful when multiple combat styles are utilized.
*Gem armours do not require charges.

## Weapons
32pxComprised of the Sapphire halberd, Sapphire longbow, Sapphire shortbow, Sapphire staff, and Sapphire warhammer, the Sapphire weapons require level 80 in their respective styles.
*Sapphire weapons must be charged with Sapphire shards to be used, at a rate of 25 charges per 1 shard.
** Tip: Utilizing the Charged Preservation Talent will reduce your chance of consuming a charge.

## Emerald Beast
32pxStarting at level 85 Slayer, players can receive Emerald Beast tasks from Nixite. 

## Armour
32pxComprised of the Emerald helm, Emerald body, and Emerald legs, the Emerald armour set requires level 85 Defence to wear. Emerald armour, although weaker in individual stats to other Tier 85 armours, provides a tribrid attack benefit to all combat styles, giving it the tradeoff of being useful when multiple combat styles are utilized.
*Gem armours do not require charges.

## Weapons
32pxComprised of the Emerald halberd, Emerald longbow, Emerald shortbow, Emerald staff, and Emerald warhammer, the Emerald weapons require level 85 in their respective styles.
*Emerald weapons must 
[... 2835 more chars ...]

## Hard clue scroll
32px Hard clue scrolls are part of the idle clue Clue system.

On completion Hard clue scrolls grant Hard Caskets. and have a base completion time of 3 hours.

## References

## High scores
The August High scores is a feature of the August RSPS website which ranks players by their overall prestiged experience in skills, Collection log completion, Random event completion, and kill counts at bosses and raids.

The board can be separated into the different game modes that August has to offer.

As of January 10th, 2025, the High scores track and order players based on when they achieved their particular achievements.

The August High scores can be viewed on the August RSPS website here

## Superior Slayer (1/200)

! I
[... 317 more chars ...]

## Instances
August has two primary instance types that players will interact with: player instances, and world instances.

## Player Instances  
Player instances are instances that are generated by the player. Slayer instances and boss instances (other than boss masses) are examples of player instances. Loot in player instances typically will appear under the player when an enemy is killed.

## World Instances 
World instances are those that are generated by events, such as boss masses (Zulrah, GWD bosses, etc.), and the  world boss arena. These instances primarily differ in that loot obtained when in a world instance is sent directly to your bank, rather than to your inventory, or dropped on the ground.

## References

## Loot mechanics
The Loot mechanics page will outline the math behind drop rates, and can be used to better understand how drops are calculated for groups specifically.

For basic information on drop rates and for solo rates, see the Drop rate page.

To be clear, this system has never been a secret, but it has been poorly communicated in the past. So, this page was born.

## Rationale
Drop rates are different in August than you would expect to see in OSRS, and this is due to many factors. The primary factors are:
* Economy at scale
* Player power

The economy of August is inherently smaller than a game like OSRS, and the player in August does exponentially more damage to NPCs than you do in OSRS. 
With these two things in mind, the drop rate of certain NPCs needs to be adjusted to balace out the game.

Drop rate is more than just the rate of the listed NPC. There are additional factors, outlined below;
* Assume a monster has a drop rate of 1/100
* On kill, regardless of party size or your damage contribution, each player has a chance to roll drops.
* Drop rolls are calculated by table first, THEN the item itself.
* Additionally, your damage contribution is factored into this rate.

## Examples

## Example 1: World Boss
Let's say you are one of 500 people killing the World Boss, and an item on that table is 1/100, and none of them drop?
Surely, there should have been 5 dropped. If this were the case, the economy would collapse. This was thought of and intentially not how it works.

For this example, let's assume you had a 1% damage contribution
* All players receive a "bonus" 20% damage contribution for being in a grouped kill.
** Total contribution is now 21%.
* With a 21% contribution, the 1/100 drop table becomes 4.761x rarer than the base rate.
* The 1/100 drop table is now 1/476

## Example 2: Trio Grouping
Let's say instead of being 1 of 500 people, you're in a trio.

For this example, let's assume you had a 33% damage contribution
* All players receive a "bonus" 20% damage con
[... 1973 more chars ...]

## Master clue scroll
32px Master clue scrolls are part of the idle clue Clue system.

On completion Master clue scrolls grant Master Caskets. and have a base completion time of 12 hours.

## Olympian feast
50px|left The Olympian feast is a food that heals 60 when eaten and provides an Overload boost for 5 minutes.

Olympian feasts cannot be created, and are only dropped from monsters or chests.
