## Patch notes
## 2026 
*  April 30 - Giga Patch, Major QoL, New interfaces, Echo Bosses, Gauntlet, and more bosses
*  January 31 - Leagues Launch
*  January 22 - Leagues prep with broadcast toggles, TOB Pandora perks, Early/mid achievements & Trial systems

## 2025 
*  December 17 - Christmas 2025 event with Big Nagua, Event weapons, Leaderboards & Dragonfire fixes
*  December 3 - Yama contract adjustments, Radiant Oathplate for Slayer Locked, Bond button & Christmas preview
*  November 26 - Yama boss release with contracts, Radiant Oathplate competition, Bank capacity 1500 & Christmas theme
*  October 31 - Boss HP bar fix, Halloween QoL improvements, Cash Money animation & November voting rewards
*  October 27 - Halloween 2025 event, Reimagined Breaches, New smithing mechanics, Boss HP bars & ToB fixes
*  October 13 - ToB loot rebalancing, Pet fixes, Halloween home theme & Event preparation
*  October 7 - ToB bug fixes for Xarpus, Verzik, damage tracking & Equipment interaction improvements
*  October 3 - ToB pre-patch, Redesigned achievements interface, Sunder armour visuals & 2h weapon fix
*  September 29 - Follow-up bug fixes for noted items, equipment, Apollo animations & item interactions
*  September 28 - Tech upgrades, Tormented Demons boss with Demonbane weapons & Future content preview
*  August 28 - Post-revision bug fixes for RuneLite, animations, bank options & world synchronization
*  July 25 - Pre Leagues 1 Patches, Bug Fixes & Misc changes
*  July 15 - New Donator Store, Collection Log Rewards, Updates to Pet System & Misc changes
*  May 18 - New Starter Experience, Hard mode Boss Practice Modes & Misc changes
*  May 4 - New Loot Interface, Vote Streak Changes, End of Easter event & Misc changes
*  April 26 - New Boss - Echo DKs, New Vote Interface & Misc QoL Changes
*  April 13 - 13 Major Buffs, Easter Event, Grand Exchange Changes & Multi-world Support
*  April 1 - QoL improvements, Bug fixes & New world boss to replace tarn
*  March 4 - Small bug fixes
*  March
[... 3261 more chars ...]

## Patch notes/Apr 01 2025
## Summary 
This April update includes numerous bug fixes and quality-of-life improvements while introducing a brand new world boss replacing Tarn as the default vote boss. The update also features updated appearances for the Tumeken's Shadow and Zaryte Crossbow to reflect the "new age" theme.

## Bug fixes and improvements 
* Auto retaliate will now work properly again even after you equip/unequip items
* The item sacrifice perk for increasing cooking success chance now applies to the DDZ cooking fire
* The Serpentine Helm permanent poison immunity buff should only work now when equipping in the regular equipment slots - not the transmog slot
* Fee Fi and Fo Fum will no longer give you loot when you're outside the WB arena, just like other world bosses
* The crystal harpoon now requires a dragon harpoon to craft it, like the other crystal tool recipes
* Pets shouldn't get stuck trying to find the target anymore
* The Tempeross spawn in Lumbridge has been removed
* The Imbued Zamorak Cape will now prevent aggro at Zamorak GWD
* The Kraken pet no longer has an attack range of 1
* Mossy keys will now be auto picked up by the Key Master's Vault talent
* KBD will now drop Infinity Cloth and Ranger's Fabric
* ::sayyourprayers is now ::syp to save your fingers

## New World Boss 
A brand new world boss has been released, unlike anything seen before! This boss takes the place of Tarn as the default vote boss.

Along with the release of this new boss, the appearance of the Tumeken's Shadow and Zaryte Crossbow has been updated to reflect the theme of the "new age" we are entering.

## Patch notes/Apr 13 2025
## Summary 
This significant update introduces 13 major buffs to equipment and talents, implements a simple but rewarding Easter event featuring Stompy the world boss, and includes major backend rewrites for the Grand Exchange and grouping systems for multi-world support. The update also enhances transmog functionality and makes various quality-of-life improvements.

## 13 New Buffs 
* The Masori set effect HP requirement has been removed
* The ZCB bolt proc chance increase has been buffed from 20% to 50%
* The talent 'Armament Prodigy' now reduces the level requirement to equip ammo slot items too
* The Sanguine Torva flurry proc chance set effect has been buffed from a 33% increase to a 66% increase
* The new Melee T2 talent is 'Giant Slayer', granting up to 5% extra damage per tile size for the target. i.e. 5x5 target = +25% max hit with melee
* The Cerberite slayer helm effect, which increases max hit vs demons has been buffed from +5 to +15 max hit
* AFK zone: Firemaking now counts as a crafting skill for the 'Sleepy Crafter' talent
* Noted logs can be used on a bonfire @ Emerald donator rank and above
* Expedited production now works for bonfires
* Slower (>4t base) magic weapons have increased healing, and now heal for 10% from blood spells instead of 5%
* The talent 'Rampage' has been replaced with 'Precision', a new NPC weakness exploitation talent that gives you massive power when exploiting NPC weaknesses
* The talent Victory Rush has been moved to tier 4, and is now accessible to all combat styles
* The old talent 'Aggression' has been added back in, but only procs when exploiting NPC weaknesses

## Grand Exchange rewrite 
As part of the multi-world efforts, the Grand Exchange needed to be rewritten.

There is one very important detail you need to understand:
* All of your existing orders in the GE will be automatically cancelled, and can be collected by using the command ::oldge
* You can use the ::oldge command as many times as you need to collect, if 
[... 4061 more chars ...]

## Patch notes/Apr 26 2025
## Summary 
This update introduces the Echo Dagannoth Kings as new endgame content that rewards tier 110-115 upgrades for rings and amulets. The update also includes numerous quality-of-life improvements and bug fixes such as smarter ammo handling, collection log cleanup, and a new in-game voting interface.

## Bug / QOL / Other changes 
* You can now freely equip ammo/blessings regardless of your equipped weapon
** The game is much smarter now and will exclude the ammo ranged str bonus if it doesn't match what your weapon uses
* Hephaestus can no longer be frozen, which should smooth out the fight cause he won't get stuck
* Unobtainable and previous holiday pets have been removed from the collection log, which should unblock completion for many players
* Persistent Gatherer (talent) should now stack with Tireless Gatherer (item sink perk), allowing you to continue to cycle through your gathering for longer
* KBD now has a boss task!
* You can no longer cook above your daily limit in the dragonstone zone with a pocket flame
* You shouldn't get stuck anymore if you equip/unequip items while teleporting
* There's now a 3rd age harpoon which you can use at any fishing spot
* There's an all new ::vote interface that's a bit more informative and in-game!
* The Tumeken's Shadow should now be able to be dropped

## Echo Dagannoth Kings 
Enjoy a new end game piece of content!

This fight will test (and train) your prayer flicking skills and rhythm.

The kings will reward you with some very attractive bits of loot, enabling you to upgrade from your Ornamental Zenyte necklaces and regular DK rings up to Tier 110 rings/amulets!

The upgraded amulets will give you a higher lifesteal percentage - 1.5% up from 1%.
Combining all 3 amulets together will give you a Tier 115 tribrid BIS amulet which also has 2.5% lifesteal!

The rings can also be combined together at the furnace to create a Tier 115 tribrid BIS ring.

## Patch notes/Apr 30 2026
Again.. No patch notes. Was told "To much to write not doing it".

Here's a reddit post basically going over what all has changed.

Link to post

## Patch notes/Aug 02 2024
## Update from Aug 02 2024 
This major update focuses on improving game stability and fixing critical bugs while introducing Slayer Task Instances to address congestion. The update also enhances GIM group functionality, improves Ring of Life mechanics, adjusts talent requirements, and implements numerous quality-of-life changes across various game systems.

## GIM improvements 
GIM grouping functionality should now be working properly. If the party interface is still experiencing issues, you can use the following commands:
* ::groupcreate
* ::groupinvite
* ::groupleave

## Slayer Task Instances 
To help with the huge amount of congestion, you can now right click the Slayer Teleporter at home, and choose to either pay:
* 30 slayer points, or
* 1.8m cash

You'll spawn in an area with 6 of your chosen slayer task NPC, where they will be non-aggressive, and respawn until either:
* your task is completed, + 1 minute grace time
* 30 minutes has elapsed since the start of your instance

There should be permanently more gem beast spawns around the caves. We are working on adding more spawns across the rest of Gielinor as well.

You can now pay 500k to cancel a slayer task, as an alternative option to the slayer points option.

## Stability improvements 
* NPCs bugging out has been fixed
* Following will no longer build up a massive chain of queued actions that were potentially the cause of the server nulling issues
* The Grand Exchange will stop losing items
* Stale Baguette will no longer fill logs with doom

## Combat changes 
* Hephaestus and Keuthonymos now should have a proper boss health pool
* When fighting Zalcano, your equipped scythe or Tonalztics (or other weapons with hit effects) will no longer proc when throwing imbued tephra
* Apollo's orbs had an issue with setting the damage reduction applied to Apollo. This is fixed now
* Corp will no longer spawn in the world. Planning to add Corp and Zalcano to the cycle of world event instances for masses
* Corp magic a
[... 1135 more chars ...]

## Patch notes/Aug 06 2024
## Update from Aug 06 2024 
This update addresses server stability following a brief shutdown while adding several quality-of-life improvements. The update populates various dungeons with slayer creatures, implements a scheduled talent respec cost reset, improves loot handling for giant bosses, and fixes the vote boss spawn issue.

## Changes and improvements 
* The Forthos Dungeon, Brimhaven Dungeon, and Stronghold Slayer cave have been populated and configured with slayer creatures. Grubby keys and the grubby chest are also there for you to get some nice supplies
* Talent respec cost resetting will now reset on a fixed time schedule, and all players should receive a free respec with this update
* Fee Fi and Fo Fum will also send loot to the bank if your inventory is full
* The vote boss should no longer get stuck not spawning
* Development continues on the new event to optimize it for large player counts

## Patch notes/Aug 08 2024
## Update from Aug 08 2024 
This update implements several changes to Corp and its drops, including spirit shield stats adjustments, tome rebalancing, and Dark Core buffs. The update also includes various quality-of-life improvements and bug fixes for item alchemizing, vote token handling, and teleport locations.

## Corp changes 
* The spirit shields now have stats, and unique effects for them are coming soon
* Corp is now a boss slayer task you can get from Nixite
* The Dark Core is now immune to magic damage and exploding attacks

## Tome adjustments 
* Catalytic tomes and elemental tomes had their stats set to random massive numbers that weren't aligned with the tiered formulae, and have been adjusted accordingly
* Tomes will now also require being charged to get their accuracy and damage boosts for their elemental spells
* Catalytic tomes will now receive their 15% accuracy and damage bonus to single-target spells when charged

## Other changes 
* The treasure goblin vault talent will no longer lose your extra vote token if you've voted in the past 12 hours when killing a vote boss
* Alchemising items which would result in 0 coins given will now no longer say you don't have enough space. UIMs can now deal with their pet problems by alching them into nothingness
** NOTE: if you alch an item with 0 value, and you have the multi-alch talent, you will only alch one at a time
* You can no longer drop items in the world boss arena
* The Olympian Raids boss teleport won't send you into the ocean anymore
* Quick reboot to address the issue with slayer teleporter and donor shop right click options not being there

## Patch notes/Aug 09 2024
## Update from Aug 09 2024 
This update addresses several quality-of-life improvements and bug fixes following a server restart. Dense essence blocks can now be noted, animations have been improved, and the Grand Exchange has been re-enabled after fixing a critical issue.

## Changes and fixes 
* Dense essence blocks can now be noted, but the banker's note will not work on them
* Certain idle/walk animations have been tweaked to match OSRS, like holding the scythe correctly
* The Grand Exchange has been re-enabled, and the issue we were seeing is fixed
* The voting gigarare thing will no longer give you more than it should of the item, and it's been made more common to hit

The server is back up. Finding and fixing these stability issues is the #1 priority right now. As a temporary solution, we're exploring upgrading the machine to have a larger memory pool, so it can go longer without a restart.

## Patch notes/Aug 10 2024
## Update from Aug 10 2024 
This update improves server performance with several backend fixes aimed at increasing stability and allowing more players online simultaneously. The update also introduces skill capes available from the Prestige Master, with both normal and trimmed variations depending on player prestige levels.

## Performance 
I have identified and fixed a few spots in the codebase which could be contributing to the server needing to be restarted every approx 16 hours.

Additionally, I've found a couple of areas which should straight up increase server performance, allowing us to run smooth with more players.

One last thing: we will be trialling a smaller player rendering limit, where your client will only see up to 100 players in close proximity to you, instead of 255. This is able to be tuned remotely without a server restart, so we will be looking to find the sweet spot that works for us.

## Skill capes 
The Prestige Master at home will sell you skill capes for you to flex your fashion and skills!

## Requirements 
Normal cape and hood:
* Prestige 0, level 99 or above
* OR Prestige 1 (or above), any level

Trimmed cape:
* Prestige 1, any level

## Patch notes/Aug 18 2024
## Update from Aug 18 2024 
This update reintroduces the Shooting Stars minigame and implements a significant overhaul to the instance system aimed at fixing item pickup and object interaction issues. The update also includes a new YouTuber teleport and Grand Exchange access protection during server reboots.

## Shooting stars are back 
They will fall once per hour and last for a fixed amount of time before disappearing. Stardust will continue to be able to be spent at the Star Sprite next to the Makeover Mage west of home.

## Instances overhaul 
The way that instances are handled has been significantly overhauled. This is in an effort to:
* Prevent the issues where items are no longer able to be picked up in an instance
* Prevent the issues where objects are no longer able to be clicked

This is a somewhat risky change, but from our extensive internal testing, we weren't able to recreate any of the previous issues. We will be closely monitoring this.

## Other changes 
* ::beastk now takes you to BeastK's YouTuber channel
* Players will no longer be able to use the Grand Exchange right when we're about to reboot the server

## Patch notes/Aug 19 2024
## Update from Aug 19 2024 
This update implements necessary combat rebalancing including weapon strength adjustments, Corp buffs, and blood spell nerfs, while also introducing exciting new features such as the Say Your Prayers event, four new talents, and numerous cosmetic additions. The update also relocates the World Boss Arena to an instanced area for improved performance and anti-alt measures.

## Necessary rebalancing 
* Corp's core hits harder and is immune to porcupine damage
* Corp and the core have had a bit of a stat boost and so will have higher attack and defence stats
* Draining strikes has a 3 tick cooldown
* Treasure goblins will no longer drop $25 and $50 bonds, as these were coming into the game far more frequently than intended
* Gem shields were too strong with their strength stats. They've had the strength lowered, and the defences buffed to compensate
* Blood spells have been knocked down to 5% of damage, bringing focus more back to upgrading gear and talents (don't forget the food eating talents), instead of heal-tanking everything with blood spells
* The vote boss was set to spawn every 100 votes expecting 200 players online. Now it's 200 votes
* Sages axe max hit has a 2t cooldown so long death animations can't be abused for massive XP drops

## Rebalancing of strength stats 
The way that attack speed affects strength stats for tiered gear has changed to be linear.

For example:
* 4 tick weapons have the base strength stat unchanged
* 2 tick weapons have the strength stat halved
* 8 tick weapons have the strength stat doubled

Previously this was tuned such that the faster your weapon was, the better it was going to be for DPS, flat out. This meant that a lot of weapon choices just weren't really viable. This should even out the playing field a bit.

On top of this, the accuracy + strength of the blowpipe and wands have been reduced slightly to bring them more in line with competing equivalent weapons.

## World Boss Arena 
This has been mov
[... 1881 more chars ...]

## Patch notes/Aug 21 2024
## Update from Aug 21 2024 
This update introduces the Mining Guild with new amethyst nodes for creating tier 80 ranged ammunition, along with various quality-of-life improvements and bug fixes. Notable changes include improvements to combat NPC behavior, better disconnect handling, and adjustments to world boss loot distribution to discourage "tag and go" behavior.

## Mining Guild 
The Mining Guild has been updated, and is now accessible. It contains a bunch of ores for F2P players to be able to mine.

The southern zone, past the doors, is accessible from Prestige 1 Mining onward, and unlocks new Amethyst nodes that can be turned into T80 ranged ammunition.

Inside this Prestige 1 req zone, there's a 33% chance that the ore you're mining will not deplete.

Towards the west, there is an additional Amethyst mining zone which is accessible past Prestige 3 Mining, which has a 50% chance to not deplete the ore you're mining.

## Say Your Prayers event 
You can now use the ::sayyourprayers command if the teleport button ever disappears, but also, the button shouldn't disappear in the middle of the event anymore.

## Misc changes 
* Armature Prodigy level requirement reduction now applies to gloves
* Ranged/Mage NPCs that would previously walk right up to you in combat, will now properly take into account their attack range
* More issues have been found, and changes have been made to prevent disconnections in certain cases
* World boss fights will now perform more efficiently, reducing load on the server, resulting in a better response rate to player actions
* Permadeath HCIMs who get reset, will now have their farming patches reset as well
* Magic XP should now be in line with the other combat styles
* Loot from NPCs which drop loot for more than one player, will no longer award you with loot if you are too far away when it dies. This is a partial change towards preventing all these "tag once and go" players who unfairly accumulate wealth from the world bosses in this w
[... 497 more chars ...]

## Patch notes/Aug 23 2024
## Summary 
This update introduces important account security features: two-factor authentication through the website and an in-game PIN system to protect banks, looting bags, and Grand Exchange access. As an incentive, players who set up both security features will receive a permanent +3% drop rate boost. The update also includes further improvements to reduce disconnection issues.

## Account Security 
There have been a few hiccups across the RSPS community with data leaks.

Some people make stupid decisions and reuse passwords from other servers. I want to provide more ways for you to safeguard your accounts, and protect your items.

## Two-factor authentication 
The website has been updated with an account summary page, where you'll be able to set up 2fa for your account.
https://august-rsps.com/account

1. Click "Setup 2fa"
2. Scan the QR code in your authenticator app
3. Enter the code it generates, and submit
4. Enter the code when you log in to the website or game client when it prompts you

## PIN 
We've added in a way to set your PIN, with ::setpin, and schedule a change to your PIN with ::changepin.

This will prevent access to:
* Bank
* Withdrawing from looting bag
* Grand exchange

Use the Runelite Bank plugin to allow you to type your PIN with your keyboard. This makes it so much easier to use.

We encourage that absolutely everyone sets up 2fa and a PIN.

Use these tools to your advantage. There is a +3% perma drop rate while you have both of these set up!

## Other updates 
* We've made even further progress towards reducing the frustrating user experience with constant disconnections. This should be noticeably improved, and make a lot of situations far less frustrating
* Thermy pet will no longer drop to the ground as an item if you're lucky enough to get one

## Patch notes/Aug 28 2025
## Summary 
This double update addresses multiple bugs introduced by the recent revision, including fixes for RuneLite functionality, league player icons, bank interface issues, shift-click dropping, client freezing from animation smoothing, and ensures all worlds receive the updates properly.

## Bug fixes - Update 1 
* RuneLite buttons like the bonus-xp-world-hop, event teleports, vote/donate, etc. should now work properly
* The Dragonstone rank icon next to league players' names should be gone now
* New players created in the league worlds should no longer be bricked on login
* Ents no longer will be unable to die
* The XP Lamp interface has had its background restored
* Bank options should be fixed now and work as expected when withdrawing items in various configurations

Note: Players were asked to restart their clients after this update.

## Bug fixes - Update 2 
* Shift-click drop toggling will now work properly
* Client freezing with animation smoothing is now fixed. The issues were the Talaria and Luminary set bonus proc animations
* The extra Dragonstone rank icon on the league worlds will disappear for real this time
* World 1, 2, 3 will get these and the above updates as well. They seemed to miss the previous night's updates
* The bonus XP world hopping functionality is fixed if you restart your client

## Patch notes/Aug 29 2024
## Update from Aug 29 2024 
This major update introduces Mage Arena 2 with three new boss fights and tier 90 imbued god capes, adds powerful special effects to all spirit shields, and implements new melee talents that scale with prestige rank. The update also includes various weapon improvements and bug fixes for combat mechanics, damage reduction, and slayer tasks.

## Mage Arena 2 
Take on 3 new boss fights:
* Derwen (Guthix)
* Justiciar Zachariah (Saradomin)
* Porazdir (Zamorak)

Defeat them to unlock the new Tier 90 mage Imbued God Capes, charged God Staves, and materials to upgrade Staff of the Dead into the Staff of Light or Staff of Balance (tier 95 staves).

Each fight has their own unique mechanics which are not like OSRS. You will need to figure out how to defeat them on your own! Good luck with getting your hands on one or many of the pets!

To the Hardcores out there, I recommend you watch somebody else first or try it out on an alt... They can pack a punch if you don't know what you're doing.

The Zamorak staff is the first mage weapon to have a special attack, which will deal 65% increased damage to targets who have an active overhead prayer.

## Spirit Shields 
Each spirit shield has been given a new special effect, on top of their existing stats!

## Arcane Spirit Shield 
* Increases damage of all magic attacks by 10%

## Spectral Spirit Shield 
* Increases damage done by ranged attacks by 0.1% per prayer point you have left

## Elysian Spirit Shield 
* 70% chance to take 15% less damage from all NPC or Player attacks

## Blood Spirit Shield 
* Soaks 25% of damage taken, applying 15% more damage back to you as rapid damage over time each tick

## Collection Logs 
Along with the Mage Arena update, Corporeal Beast and Thermonuclear Smoke Devil have all had collection log entries added!

## New Melee Talents 

## Tekton's Rage I and II 
Increased damage with 2h weapons, scaling with strength prestige rank.

## Patch notes/Dec 03 2025
## Summary 
This update focuses on Yama improvements including contract repeatability adjustments, collection log updates, and making Radiant Oathplate accessible to Slayer Locked players. The update also adds a bond donation button, previews upcoming Christmas weapons, and fixes various interface and pathing issues.

## Changes and fixes 
* The messed up trivia questions where the answer was literally e.g. "7, seven" have been fixed
* The weird thing for new accounts where all your interfaces get bunched in the center of the screen has been fixed
* There's a new bond icon next to the minimap which opens the donation interface
* A bunch of new christmas weapons and their non-christmas equivalents have been implemented in the game, but are not yet accessible, including:
** chinchompas
** venator bow
** sunlight spear
** thunder khopesh
** The Christmas event is coming along nicely, but is not ready yet this patch!
* The Yama GFX that was previewable at Hatius Cosaintus has been fixed to show the proper GFX
* Some Yama contracts now have a chance to be returned on successful completion of the contract, instead of just being able to be repeated over and over. This felt necessary for the one that allowed you to DPS so high that Yama would never hit you
* Yama contracts have been added to the collection log individually, rather than the Dossier item which was being problematic
* Some issues with achievements failing when they shouldn't for Yama have been fixed
* Radiant Oathplate now only requires Oathplate Shards, rather than Infernal Plates, which allows Slayer Locked players to be able to complete the set
* The pathing issue that allowed you to interact with objects from a distance after being stopped by objects on the way, has been fixed

## Patch notes/Dec 17 2025
## Summary 
This update launches the Christmas 2025 event featuring Big Nagua boss fights, snowball collecting, and event weapon progression through snow globe upgrades. The update also includes important dragonfire mechanics fixes, weapon balance adjustments, and various bug fixes for items and combat mechanics.

## Christmas Event 
The Christmas event is here! Santa is at the front of the map, alongside a new portal that will take you to the event area.

On the opposite side of the home entrance, you'll find a new leaderboard which keeps track of:
* Big nagua KC
* Snowballs collected
* Breaches spawned

Inside the event, you'll be given access to your own spawns of the two different types of Christmas nagua. Small ones for beginners, big ones for experienced players.

Last year's Christmas event weapons will work again this year! If you don't have any from last year, you'll be able to start getting some Candy Canes (currency) by thieving and woodcutting in the event area!
* Slayer locked will be given free Tier 1 event weapons since they can't gather

The nagua will drop snow globes which can be used to upgrade your event weapons, and excess event weapons (T3, T4) / cosmetics can be traded in at Santa for more Candy Canes!

## Other changes 
* The Elfchompa will no longer double-hit in single combat
* The Snowfall Spear no longer allows you to equip something in your offhand
* Regular dragonfire should be fully negated now when you have 2 or more antifire sources, and the antifire talent should fully negate it too
* Brutal dragonfire should work as expected as well, where having super antifire + 2 or more regular antifire things (pot, shield, prayer) and the antifire talent will fully negate dragonfire damage
* The Snowfall Spear now properly has higher stab bonus than slash bonus
* Karil crossbow projectiles shouldn't be broken anymore
* Greedy boi shouldn't delete UIMs rings anymore
* Ancient godsword specs on NPCs no longer tint them

## Patch notes/Dec 19 2024
## Update from Dec 19 2024 
This major update introduces two challenging hard mode boss fights - Ignis (Hard Mode Cerberus) and Azrael (Hard Mode Nex) - along with powerful new rewards including Cerberite gear and Sanguine Torva upgrades. The update also includes numerous game balance changes, notably the removal of the Aggression PvM talent and a new mechanic to heal NPC HP after combat.

## Ignis (Hard Mode Cerberus) 
Ignis is a challenging new encounter, which you will benefit from bringing all 3 attack styles to, that provides a new set of high tier melee gear to the table.

## Access 
* Key Master Teleports will now drop from cerberus as part of the common table, which allow you to enter the Hard Mode fight
* You also get a bunch of these by completing Cerberus achievements
* With 50 of these teleports, you can unlock permanent free access to the Hard Mode cerb by using the "Unlock-hard-mode" option on the teleport scroll
* With free access unlocked, you can use the winch like normal, but using the "Turn-hard" option

## Rewards

* Has the slayer helm effects of an imbued slayer helm
* Has tier 100 melee crush stats
* Requires P2L1 Slayer, and P2L1 Defence to equip

* Adds a flat +5 damage to demons

* Has tier 100 melee crush stats
* Requires P2L1 Strength, and P2L1 Defence to equip
* Is tradeable
* Adds a flat +5 damage to demons
* Has a 5% chance on melee hits to cause the target to burn over 5 burn stacks for the damage of the initial hit that procced it

## Cerberite Warhammer 
* Has tier 100 melee crush stats
* Requires P3L1 Strength to equip
* Is tradeable
* Has a 50% energy cost spec attack which does the same as the regular DWH, but additionally (15 sec cooldown) will spawn a fiery glyph on the floor beneath you, giving you 10% increased melee damage for up to 12 ticks while you stand on it

## Patch notes/Dec 22 2024
## Update from Dec 22 2024 
This update focuses on communication improvements with private chat filter settings now working properly and a new command to show online staff members. Several boss fight adjustments were made to Nex and Ignis/Cerberus, including changes to Nex's blood phase and updated achievements and rewards for Cerberus content.

## Communication and UI improvements 
* Private chat filter settings are now working! Set it to "On"/"Friends"/"Off" as you wish to control who can see you online / DM you
* ::staff will now show you the staff who are appearing online

## Nex changes 
* Nex blood phase in hard mode will now:
** Have 1 extra tick before the blood rain hits you
** Won't spawn blood in the same place 2 times in a row
** In both hard/normal mode will deal increased damage to you the more you get hit by the blood rain, showing you the number of stacks you have next to your timers
* Nex's shadow smash attack has the weird 2 tick delay removed before she spawns the shadow under you

## Cerberus/Ignis changes 
* The 500 Ignis KC achievement is now a grandmaster achievement instead of master
* The Cerberus achievements that give you Zulrah scales as rewards no longer do, and the ones that give cerberite cores no longer do
** Instead, some of the hard mode achievements will award talent points
* Ignis will no longer drop dragon lump/shard/slice on the rare table, making the hard mode components a bit more common

## Zulrah changes 
* Zulrah uniques can now be turned into zulrah scales at the anvil

## Patch notes/Dec 2 2024
## Update from Dec 2 2024 
This update introduces the new Christmas Trinket available through voting, featuring ice-themed variants of powerful weapons and a chance at the exclusive Ice Anti-Santa pet. The update also fixes the runecrafting bug that was reducing rune production, allows ironman players to downgrade their mode, and includes numerous small fixes and balance changes.

## Misc updates 
* Utility Unleashed will now properly require charges
* Large spades are now tradeable
* Only check for dragonstone rank when actually using DDZ door
* Limit triple drop tokens in DDZ to 3 per week
* Drop loot for all contributors for Cerberus instead of just 1 person
* Give adrenaline assault a 3t cooldown, attempting to try and retain the power, without 1t blowpipe being infinite health
* Players lower than dragonstone rank will no longer receive dragonstone zone points for voting
* Disallow superiors from engaging in combat with other people
* Add a warning to donation rank transferring about it only being allowed to move rank between your own accounts
* Don't activate drop multiplier token if you're too far from the npc
* Nihil horn is now tradeable
* Corp tome page drops will no longer broadcast to the entire world
* The DDZ cooking fire will now properly take all 40 minnows when cooking them there
* Mossy keys will now be auto-looted with the keyring / key utility talent
* Using Last Recall will now properly interrupt your actions upon use

## Notable changes 
* You can now choose to deiron / downgrade your ironman mode by talking to the ironman tutor
* The bug that caused runecrafting to produce far less runes at higher levels has been fixed, and you'll now gain a bunch of runes and XP again
* Our auction finished yesterday, and we have a couple of new really impressive looking cosmetic sets added for the winner

[... 803 more chars ...]

## Patch notes/Dec 9 2024
## Update from Dec 19 2024 
This update introduces the Christmas Event featuring special event weapons with fixed max hits, a variety of festive NPCs to battle, and numerous rewards including exclusive pets, cosmetics, and buffs. The event is particularly beneficial for new and returning players with a unique combat system where weapon tier determines damage rather than player stats.

## Christmas Event 
Have a chat with Santa Claus to get your hands on some event weapons, and enter the portal to the event area to kill the Christmas Event NPCs!

Newer players or players who have prestiged their combat stats will be able to train up very quickly, as the event weapons have fixed max hits at different tiers:
* Tier 1: 35 max hit, 15% chance to hit max hit
* Tier 2: 50 max hit, 20% chance to hit max hit
* Tier 3: 55 max hit, 25% chance to hit max hit, and flurry PvM talents will be allowed to proc
* Tier 4: 70 max hit, 33% chance to max hit, and flurry works as well

These max hits will always be set according to your weapon, so your stats don't matter!

NOTE: For the sake of balancing, the majority of damaging PVM talents have been disabled in the event area, as well as combat pets.

NPCs in the event area will drop Festive Holly - the Christmas Event currency!

## Santa Claus Shop 
Purchase Christmas Presents, Christmas Crackers, and Christmas Trinkets from Santa Claus with Festive Holly!

Trade in items you don't need to Santa Claus for some Festive Holly back to spend on more things!

## Ice Mimic 
There will be a chance for the Ice Mimic to spawn in the Christmas Event Area. This is a global boss which can drop a bunch of good loot! Teleport there with "::mimic". We will be running events throughout the Christmas Event, spawning Ice Mimics for everyone to fight!

## Shooting Star 
The regular shooting star has been replaced with an icy variant which will give you Festive Holly as well as stardust when you mine it.

## Mulled Wine

## Patch notes/Feb 02 2025
## Update from Feb 2 2025 
This update introduces various quality-of-life improvements across multiple game areas, with particular focus on Slayer-locked accounts who now receive an iron scimitar after the tutorial and can access anti-dragon shields more easily. The update also fixes several bugs related to achievements, equipment requirements, and monster behaviors.

## Slayer changes 
* Hard Mode Zulrah/Cerb slayer helmets have been added to the slayer helmet collection log
* Slayer locked accounts will now receive an iron scimitar upon completing the tutorial to start them off in the event they don't already have a special game plan to obtain a starter weapon
* Anti-dragon shields are now dropped by KBD quite commonly, and will also be available in the slayer point shop for 100 points
* You will now be able to attack superiors even when your task has finished, if you're slayer-locked
* Spiders around lumbridge should now be killable on spider tasks

## Drops and rewards 
* Large amounts of noted vials of water now drop from Kraken

## Bug fixes 
* A few youtuber commands have been fixed, so you can go to their channels when they're online
* Porcupine will no longer hit NPCs back who you cannot hit normally yourself
* Achievements around assigning talent points will no longer spam your chatbox
* MA2 capes and poseidon gear now properly also requires magic levels to equip

## Patch notes/Feb 04 2025
## Update from Feb 4 2025 
This small patch addresses several Slayer-related issues, particularly for Slayer locked players who were incorrectly receiving Olympian raid tasks, while also making Vorkath's zombified minions properly vulnerable to Crumble Undead again. Additionally, the update increases the weighting of certain important tasks for early Slayer masters to improve task variety.

## Slayer changes 
* Olympian raid tasks for slayer locked players will no longer be assigned outside of Nixite boss tasks
* Slayer Locked players can now additionally access the Olympian Vendor shop for sidegrade/downgrade tokens
* Increased the weighting of a few important tasks for earlier slayer masters: citizens, chickens, chaos druids, cave horrors

## Boss fixes 
* Vorkath zombified minions should be 1-hittable again with crumble undead

## Patch notes/Feb 07 2025
## Update from Feb 7 2025 
This update focuses on improving the Slayer skill by introducing a task-blocking system that allows players to block up to six unwanted tasks with various unlock requirements. Additionally, several monster-related fixes were implemented, including changes to metal dragons, baby green dragons, and the addition of undead druids to Chaos Druid tasks.

## Slayer Block System 
* You can now block Slayer tasks for 200 Slayer points.
* Unlock up to 6 slots maximum:
** 1. Free slot
** 2. Prestige 1 Slayer requirement
** 3. Prestige 2 Slayer requirement
** 4. Prestige 3 Slayer requirement
** 5. Dragonstone rank benefit
** 6. Tanzanite rank benefit

## Monster fixes 
* Metal dragons no longer have PJing behavior
* Baby green dragons can be killed on green dragon tasks
* Cows drop needles 10x more often
* Undead druids can be killed on Chaos Druid tasks now

## Patch notes/Feb 13 2025
= Update from Feb 13 2025 =

## New slayer tasks 
* Aviansies
* Dark beasts
* Sulphur lizards
* Drakes
* Wyrms

## New items from the Drakes slayer task 
* Drake's Devotion (devout boots upgrade)
* Dragonic Hasta (better than ghrazi rapier)
* Brimstone Boots (early tribrid boots)

## Slayer locked 
* Can now attack Zebak's jugs
* TOA boss tasks combined into a single TOA boss task
* Vetion's hounds can now be attacked on Skeleton and World Boss tasks
* Fo Fum can now be attacked on a World Boss task
* Slayer Locked players can now access the Dragonstone Donator Zone shop, but cannot buy dragonstone supply crates.

## Slayer in general 
* Ancient ceremonial beings can no longer be fought in a slayer instance
* The baby green dragon teleport has been fixed to place you in the correct location
* The achievement for counting superior NPC kills will now properly track for all superior NPC types
* Some blue dragons with different IDs now properly work for blue dragon slayer tasks
* Pets can now attack superior creatures

## Interface changes 
* Certain shops now use a new shop UI that I've created and plan to use more in different scenarios in the future. This should scale nicely according to your client size and show more information in some cases
* Certain UI elements will now have bright borders when selected

## Other changes 
* The other $25 rank book in the vote shop (duplicate) has been removed
* The olympian fishing spot in the F2P area that was previously blocked by a willow tree, can now be accessed south of the tree
* Certain NPCs could hit you through doors before, and cannot anymore. Also, Dragonstone Drakes shouldn't be safespottable anymore in very specific places
* Diamonds have been added to the Enhanced Crystal Chest loot table

## Valentine's Day 
Some fancy new cosmetics have appeared in the donator store! Excited to see some new transmog around the place. Happy Valentine's Day (probably tomorrow for most of you)!

## Patch notes/Feb 18 2025
= Update from Feb 18 2025 =
This update primarily addresses several bug fixes in the game, including issues with the DDZ slayer spawner, Olympian raid scaling, and Kree's combat logic. Additionally, it introduces quality-of-life improvements such as a longer vote buff duration, a new 'Trinket of slaughter' for extending slayer tasks, and changes to raid instance selection that prevents players from losing coins when choosing raid types.

## Bug fixes 
* The DDZ slayer spawner will no longer spawn superiors back to back
* Wyrm bones should now work properly with all interactions
* Fixed issues with olympian raid scaling not working properly, and players getting locked out of the Hephaestus room
* A bug with Hephaestus' HP scaling was also fixed where he was scaling at the same rate as regular NPCs, rather than scaling like a raid boss like the others do
* If you die in the Apollo fight before the fight starts, then leave, then re-enter, you will be put back in the bin. Previously Apollo would ignore you for all attacks.
* A bug where you could use the slayer task extension trinket multiple times for the same task if you log out in between uses
* Kree will no longer use Kril's combat logic and smite players

## New features 
* The vote buff will now last for 13 hours instead of 12, so you have that 1 hour buffer where you can vote again without losing your buffs
* There's a new 'Trinket of slaughter' which you can buy in the Slayer point store, which can extend your current Slayer task one time, adding the max amount which that task can be assigned on top of your existing amount.
* You can now spin bowstrings at the spinning wheel to get thread

## Raid changes 
* In preparation for a certain sought-after raid there's been significant underlying changes to how Olympian raid instances are spun up / torn down.
* A happy side effect: you now choose your type (gim/party/solo) before paying the 200k toll. So your cash won't get taken anymore if you click away from selectin
[... 140 more chars ...]

## Patch notes/Feb 28 2025
= Update from Feb 28 2025 =
This Major update introduces the Item Sacrifice System with 79 new perks across 10 categories, completely revamps damage mitigation mechanics to make gear more impactful, and implements NPC Weaknesses to add strategic depth to combat. The update also includes upgradeable pets with progression systems, new AFK training options for Thieving and Herblore, improved voting rewards with a streak system, and a change allowing Slayer Locked players to downgrade their ironman mode while still preventing full de-ironing.

## Slayer Locked Ironman Mode downgrading change 
When the Slayer Locked mode released, the ironman mode downgrading system didn't support not letting you completely de-iron.

This system has been upgraded now to support this case, so Slayer Locked players can now downgrade their ironman mode in some cases, but none can fully de-iron still.

## New upgradeable pets 

In the donator store, there are now two new pets that have different effects aaaaand can be upgraded!

## Baby AFK pet 

A new pet on the donator store online, is the Baby AFK pet.

This pet is upgraded to a Teen AFK pet after being fed 20 Sheep Food, and a fully grown AFK pet after another 100 Sheep Food. 
* Sheep Food can be purchased in the AFK zone store!

The pets give 15%, 30%, and 50% XP boosts for all AFK zone XP gained.

## Baby pet pet 
The Baby pet pet, Teen pet pet, and Pet pet, all boost your pet pet chance, at the cost of taking up the pet pet slot that your typical combat pet pets would take up!

Pet pets have an expensive appetite though, and eat August Tokens for a chance to be upgraded!

The pet pets give a 10%, 15%, and 20% boost to pet rate while following you.
* They also have the same pity system as the AFK pets, so you're more likely to get the upgrade the more you feed it!

Rates
Base: 1/150 to upgrade per august token
Pity boosts:
* After 50 attempts: 2x rate
* After 100 attempts: 3x rate
* After 150 attempts: 4x rate
* After 200 attempts: 6x

## Patch notes/Jan 02 2025
## Update from Jan 02 2025 
This update fixes several critical bugs, most notably a significant exploit with dragonstone bolt procs that was causing excessive DPS increases. The patch also addresses issues with Slayer task cooldowns, makes Sanguine Torva untradeable as intended, and adds a new custom item for the Christmas event winner.

## Bug fixes 
* Fixed a very obscure bug which was causing dragonstone bolt procs to apply all max hit modifiers twice (e.g. headshot, void knight set, berserker, unholy, etc.)
** This was causing MASSIVE DPS increases for using dragonstone bolts, especially with ZCB
** All max hit modifiers will now only be applied once, instead of twice, as always intended
* Sanguine torva is now untradeable as it was always meant to be
* Slayer task cooldowns will now reset properly, and now use the same system as other features with hourly/daily/weekly cooldowns

## New content 
* Gim Hez gets his new custom item for winning the Christmas event

## Patch notes/Jan 09 2025
## Update from Jan 09 2025 
This update introduces a highly requested feature allowing Group Ironman (GIM) players to party up separately from their GIM group and join instances with others. The update also includes performance improvements to instance creation, changes to shooting star requirements, and introduces a new event called Chambers of Chance.

## GIM Partying 
Group Irons can now party up, separate from their GIM group, and join instances with others!

The partying interface and GIM grouping interface are now on separate tabs.

* Type \g before your message to send a GIM group message
* Type \p before your message to send a party message

(Previously was just \ prefix to send a 'group' message)

## Other changes 
* Performance boost to how the game handles creating instances
* Shooting stars will now require that you have voted on the Runelocus and/or Runelist toplists to be able to mine at them
* There's a new event called the Chambers of Chance (CoC for short)
* Server stability improvements to prevent crashes like those experienced previously

## Patch notes/Jan 17 2025
## Update from Jan 17 2025 
This update introduces several key combat improvements, including the addition of NPC weaknesses and fixing how burns and headshot mechanics function. The update also includes various quality-of-life changes such as improved talent respec costs, collection log tracking in high scores, and enhancements to the game mode selection interface.

## Combat changes 
* Burns will now do damage instead of just showing a hitsplat
* NPCs can now have 'weaknesses', which will be applied across the board to NPCs in the coming updates
* Pets should no longer auto retaliate against their owner, and you shouldn't be able to AOE your pets
* Headshot will only proc for ranged attacks now (this bug has existed for a long time)

## Quality of life improvements 
* Community mystery boxes will only announce the big drops to the world now
* The untradeable item warning in shops can now be auto-accepted with the 'Safety Off' utility talent
* Collection log slot count will be tracked in the high scores now
* Talent spec reset costs will now reset for ALL spec slots you have, instead of only one of them resetting per week
* The game mode interface has had a slight update that will make game mode selection a lot snappier, and allow for more game modes to be added more easily than in the past

## Patch notes/Jan 22 2026
## Summary 
This update prepares the game for the Leagues launch with world-specific broadcast toggles, introduces numerous quality-of-life improvements including Alchemical Hydra speed increase and TOB Pandora perks, adds extensive early/mid game achievements, and implements trial systems for clues and tempering rework that may come to the main game based on feedback.

## Changes coming to all worlds 

## World broadcast toggles 
You can choose to toggle off/on news or loot broadcasts from specific worlds. For example, if you're not interested in the league, you would do:

::togglelootbroadcasts 4
::togglelootbroadcasts 5
::togglelootbroadcasts 6
::togglenewsbroadcasts 4
::togglenewsbroadcasts 5
::togglenewsbroadcasts 6

## General improvements 
* Alchemical Hydra's vents will now fire off every 6 ticks instead of 10
* There are now 2 new TOB related Pandora's bench perks under the 'Raiding' category for purple chance and orn kit chance
* There's now an 'All Skills' rolling bonus XP that can be randomly selected, which boosts XP for all skills by the same amount as usual
* Pandora's bench will no longer reset its scroll position every time you upgrade a perk
* When you complete a Fight Cave boss (Jad/Hard Jad), you will no longer be booted from the instance, so you can pick up whatever you need before choosing to leave
* When harvesting potions through farming, you will now receive Herblore XP, and when a herb can make more than 1 potion, you will randomly receive one of them. This is most noticeable when harvesting potions from Torstols. You'll have a 50/50 chance to get Zamorak Brews or Super Combat Potions now
* You should no longer get stuck at the Ornate Rejuvination Pool if you open an interface or something in the middle of the animation
* Obby staves are now properly treated as staves
* Bait fishing now works as expected
* Several types of achievements should now correctly update and notify you when completed instead of only updating when you open the inter

## Patch notes/Jan 28 2025
## Update from Jan 28 2025 
This update introduces the powerful Golden God talent that enables auto-alching of stacks, alongside numerous Slayer changes aimed at balancing the Slayer-Locked game mode. The update also adds new Slayer tasks and superiors, while improving drop tables and making various quality-of-life improvements across multiple game systems.

## Golden God talent 
A new talent that allows Alchemy spells to automatically recast on stacks of items:

* When Alchemy spells are cast on a stack of items, the spells will automatically be recast over time, until the stack is depleted or moved
* Actions that would normally cancel Alchemy such as walking or attacking will not do so whilst it is automatically casting
* Each cast does require runes to cast the spell
* Repeated casts can continue even while you are not on the standard spellbook
* Stacks with Masterful Alchemist - meaning you can automatically alch up to 11 items per alch
* Talent point allocation:
** 1 point: 5 repeated alchs
** 2 points: 12 repeated alchs
** 3 points: 20 repeated alchs
** 4 points: 29 repeated alchs
** 5 points: 40 repeated alchs

## Slayer changes 
* Slayer Mystery Boxes rare drop table rate has been buffed significantly, giving rare loot more commonly, and always giving some additional coins/tokens
* The first 10 Slayer tasks you do on your account will assign a fixed amount of 15 NPCs to kill, smoothing out the initial Slayer grind for newer players
* Slayer-Locked accounts now have a cooldown added for Turael skipping AFTER level 40 slayer
** This cooldown is 20 minutes per 40 total Slayer levels you have gained
* Slayer-Locked accounts cannot unlock the Unnatural Selection talent in the PvM tree
* The prestige cap for Slayer-Locked accounts has been reduced to 9
* Despite being able to mine Zalcano on a black demon task, Slayer-Locked accounts cannot take part in the Zalcano mini-game

## New tasks 
* Citizens of Gielinor (man/woman/farmer)
* Aberrant Spectres
* Wizards (wi
[... 1496 more chars ...]

## Patch notes/Jul 18 2025
## Summary 
This major update introduces a complete overhaul of the donation system with in-game interface and automatic item delivery, implements a new Utility pet slot system allowing multiple pets simultaneously, and adds collection log rewards. The update also includes various quality-of-life improvements and pet behavior enhancements in preparation for the upcoming 1-year anniversary event.

## New donation system 
The https://august-rsps.com website will no longer be where you go to donate. This has moved to be an in-game interface now which takes you directly to Stripe for payment.
Items will no longer be claimed with ::claimdonations - they will automatically be delivered to your mailbox. If you are planning to support the server through donations, please do take a moment to review the updated Terms and Conditions.
Along with the new UI, there's also a new system to reward those who support the server with free bonus loot at certain thresholds, a completely redesigned donator mystery box (replacing the existing 3), and a new 'Legendary Promo Crate' that contains some special loot.

## Collection log rewards 
Green-logging in the collection log will now give you bonus rewards as a cherry on top for the hard work (or luck)!
Most of the rewards you'll already be familiar with. Some you won't be - so examine those!
The main thing is the Mystery Box Token, which can be spent at the Mystery Box Shop next to Hatius Cosaintus for your choice of mystery boxes to purchase.

## Updated pet system 
I've rewritten how pets work such that you'll now be able to have certain pets in their own Utility pet slot! This includes: the T3 Pet Pet, T3 AFK Pet, Homeful Dog, Pak Yak, and Vote Pet.
This means that you can keep your fighting pets in the Default pet slot whilst keeping the bonus of your utility pets at the same time!

## New commands for pets 

::listpets - to see the different pets you have in different slots
::clearpets - to despawn pets that are not in the Default pe

## Patch notes/Jul 25 2025
## Summary 
This double pre-patch update prepares the game for the upcoming Leagues event with tutorial preparations, bonus voucher flexibility, EUR currency support for European players, and various quality-of-life improvements. The update also includes numerous bug fixes for combat mechanics, drop tables, and instance behavior.

## League pre-patch - Update 1 
* Fixed a bug with the melee min-hit style-specific weakness pandora perks that was preventing the min hit increase from being added against NPCs that were lower than tier 95
* Getting the tutorial ready to house all players without allowing unfair advantages for people hopping on early before the event starts
* Bonus vouchers now allow you to choose between getting bonds or mystery boxes when redeeming them
* The world switcher interface should be working properly now
* The GIM collection log interface will no longer give you the false impression that you can collect rewards for GIM-green-logged logs
* The queued world bosses will now be sent to players in the arena as it updates, so you know what's coming up
* For Europeans, the ::donate interface now allows you to select EUR as a currency, which opens up a bunch of European payment methods that were previously unavailable

## League pre-patch - Update 2 
* When fighting, you'll not only get Evil Chickens, but also Rick Turpentine, Sandwich Lady, and Genies
* The relic unlock emote now shows the august league relic unlock
* There's an additional warning when transferring rank TO a slayer locked account, making sure you understand and agree that rank can't be transferred back off of a slayer locked account
* Ignis' drop table has been buffed a little bit, and the jar of souls has been moved to the Ignis collection log, out of the Cerb collection log
* Bonecrusher with utility unleashed will now properly give you prayer points
* Echo DKs will now drop boss and pvm tokens
* The Consistency talent has had its description updated to be more clear how it works

## Patch notes/Jul 26 2024
## Update from Jul 26 2024 
This update fixes several issues including the refer command functionality, adjusts world boss HP scaling, and makes quality-of-life improvements like making auto-thieving available to all players. The update also addresses equipment requirements and pet behavior.

## Changes and fixes 
* ::refer should now work properly
** Some were able to claim this twice, and this is okay. Players from the original launch still had their referrer set
** Some players got an extra box
* The various Youtuber channels have been added so you can do e.g. ::vihtic to go straight to the channel
* World bosses have had their HP scaling nerfed significantly so that they aren't virtually unkillable
* Grace of the Elves would previously allow other players to take free resources, so this has been fixed
* The misleading donator rank info about accessing the donator skilling zones has been amended
* The robin hood hat no longer requires 80 defence, like the rest of the rangers outfit which has a 40 defence requirement
* Dizana's Quiver is now tradeable
* Pets will no longer disappear if you pick them up with a full inventory
* Everyone can now auto-thieve from stalls and NPCs, instead of that being restricted to Sapphire rank

## Patch notes/Jul 27 2024
## Update from Jul 27 2024 
This update resolves several critical issues including split private chat problems, disconnect handling improvements, and re-enabling the Grand Exchange. The update also includes various balance adjustments, quality-of-life improvements, and bug fixes across multiple game systems.

## Major fixes 
* Split private chat and chat scrolling issues have been resolved
* When you disconnect from your character and can't log in because it's already logged in, make a single login request, wait 20 seconds, then you should be able to log in again without needing a kick
* The Slayer Teleporter cooldown-bypass-fee is now affected by the Teleportation Haggler talent
* The Grand Exchange is no longer disabled
** You can now also sell types of item currencies, except for coins (e.g. Upgrade gems, august tokens, vote tokens, etc.)

## Equipment and item changes 
* You can no longer ignore the warning and temper your only item in your inventory. You will need at least 2 in your inventory to temper
* The Unholy Book you get from the melee bundle in the donator store has been fixed, and is now correctly giving a book of war
* Dizana's quiver and Ava's assembler now requires 85 and 75 ranged respectively, to equip, rather than 100 and 90 defence
* The corrupted community mystery box is now tradeable

## World adjustments 
* World bosses and vote bosses now scale HP uniformly, and are no longer tuned for a server launch where nobody has any gear
* Shooting stars has been temporarily disabled. The feature needs time for development and testing before re-releasing
** The Star Sprite has been spawned next to the makeover mage, west of ::home, for anyone to spend their existing stardust
* More cave horror spawns have been added
* Demonic gorillas now have smarter pathfinding
* The aggressive ZMI NPCs next to the altar have been removed

## Economy and resources 
* Infinity cloth shop sell value has been reduced, and the frequency of gathering is slightly reduced

## Patch notes/Jul 29 2024
## Update from Jul 29 2024 
This update introduces the ability to downgrade from Masochist game mode and implements numerous quality-of-life improvements and bug fixes across various game systems. The update includes iron account changes, pet visibility improvements, resource gathering adjustments, and numerous interaction fixes for various game features.

## Game Mode Changes 
* You can now downgrade your Masochist game mode by talking to the masochist in the cow pen at home
* Irons will no longer see other peoples' loot
* UIMs will no longer get their essence shards sent to their bank
* GIM players can no longer teleport out of the node with your spellbook before finalizing their group

## Equipment and Item Fixes 
* Starter staff and other OSRS charged staves should now work properly
* The skill guide for magic weapons will now correctly show ancient staff as a level 60
* The looting bag will no longer take your items and never give them back
* The slayer's staff can be used off task now
* You can reclaim your starter weapons, and looting bag if you're a UIM, by using "Collect-items" on the Talent Manager at home
* Voidwaker pieces should now be tradeable
* Rock cake will now hit 9s instead of 3s as the base damage

## Resource Gathering 
* Infernal gatherer should no longer break your woodcutting
* Infernal gatherer proccing on Granite, Luminite, and Coal, will now give you 3 dust per ore you proc, instead of 1 each
* The onyx and zenyte gem stalls will no longer produce excessive gems
* The rogue's outfit will no longer halve your skilling tokens when gathering for non-thieving skills
* The Zalcano area now has demonite ores, and the south-west 'dragon area' in the home map now has dragonite ores

## World Boss Arena 
* You will be automatically teleported out of the World Boss Arena on login
* The 2 northern rows of tiles in the World Boss Arena is now multi-combat, as it should have been
* The World Boss scaled HP cap of 30000 HP has been removed

## Patch notes/Jul 30 2024
## Update from Jul 30 2024 
This update introduces an improved Grand Exchange listing interface, implements changes aimed at reducing disconnections, and includes various balance adjustments including reduced blood spell healing, pet rate reductions, and fixes for several boss and item mechanics.

## Changes and improvements 
* The Grand Exchange will now show you how many of an item are already listed when creating a buy offer, so you can know if there's none on there in the first place, or if you just need to pay a bit more
* EVERYONE SHOULD experience far less disconnections! A change has been made that, in theory, should prevent these seemingly-random account nulling/booting issues
* Boss health can now be adjusted without a server restart, and will be increased as players have become too strong
* Superior Dragonstone Drakes should no longer respawn
* Using the Corrupted AFK Zone objects when you don't have the rank or scroll activated will no longer work
* Red Dragons now exist, and are a slayer task, so you can now get your red dhide gear
* Draining Strikes and Consistency no longer are proccing on special weapon effects such as the Scythe of Vitur extra hits
* Blood spells were allowing people to just AFK top tier bosses, so the healing on them has reduced from 25% to 15%
* Zenyte ornamental necklaces have been buffed from tier 95 stats to tier 97
* Essence shards are now tradeable, and can be obtained from the Corporeal Beast
* The beginner wand's primary ingredient that is saved on failure is now the sapphire frame instead of a magic log
* Pet rates have been reduced. These are meant to be rare, and pog moments
* The Looting Bag 'deposit all' option will no longer deposit noted items into your bank as notes (It will unnote them as they are deposited)
* Wayne's custom cosmetics from the auction are now in game

## Patch notes/Jul 31 2024
## Update from Jul 31 2024 
This minor update includes several bug fixes and game balance adjustments while the team works on addressing the partying issue and developing solutions for mob density problems. The update notes that future updates will be larger but less frequent than the daily ones since launch.

## Bug fixes and adjustments 
* Bronze/iron/steel javelins no longer require themselves to be crafted
* New players will get their starter items again
* High level thieving success rates have been reduced a bit, and infinity cloth can't be sold to the shop anymore for large amounts of cash
* Barrows pets will no longer be tradeable
* All leather items can now be crafted with 100% success rate
* World bosses will stop generating excessive world boss jars
* Moderators and administrators now have improved tools to handle player requests and verify issues

## Patch notes/Mar 02 2025
= Update from March 2 2025 =
In response to the previous combat patch.

This update introduces three new tier 90 bosses (Obor, Bryophyta, and Giant mole) with unique rewards, while addressing player feedback by adding "easy mode" options for GWD and Kraken. The easy mode versions offer more accessible gameplay with adjusted mechanics and drop rates, allowing more players to engage with this content while still incentivizing the more challenging normal modes with better rewards.

## New bosses (all t90) 

* Obor (boss teleports, giants task, giant key to enter for up to 15 respawns)
* Bryophyta (boss teleports, giants task, mossy key to enter for up to 15 respawns)
* Giant mole (boss teleports, new boss task, don't fuck around digging and moving - just smash)

## New Loot 
* Holy moleys (boots from mole, smithing)
* Molefang claws (claws with spec from mole, smithing)
* Baby mole pet
* Nature's edge (bryophyta sword, warding)
* Bryophyta's staff (warding)
* Lil mossie pet
* Hill giant club (obor, crush, not crafted)
* Bam bam pet

## GWD changes 

There's now an "Enter-easy-mode" option on the doors which:
* Costs 200k to enter
* Has 25 respawns with 20s delay
* All easy mode GWD bosses do not have the extra august mechanics.
* All easy mode GWD bosses do not have full item drop tables and pet tables.
* Comp/mbox table is 1/52 instead of 1/32

Also, minion attack stats have been lowered across the board for GWD, meaning they should hit you less.

## Kraken change 

Kraken will now automatically start hitting you, so will be able to auto retaliate.

There is now an 'easy mode' kraken and 'normal mode' kraken.

## Easy mode 
* Exact same drop tables as before this patch
* Kraken now just casts a simple water surge at you, which can be protected against completely.
* 4 tentacles now spawn, which deal teeeeeny weeeeny hits. Like 0-3 damage. These should be able to be easily countered with some simple sustaining perks / abilities.

## Normal mode 
* Now is more like V1 Kr
[... 959 more chars ...]

## Patch notes/Mar 04 2025
## Update from March 4 2025 
This small update addresses three issues: reducing metal dragon aggression range, fixing a bug with Pandora's essence rewards from voting, and resolving an equipment manipulation exploit during queued actions.

## Changes and fixes 
* Iron/steel dragons aggro range has been reduced so it's not so annoying to walk around that area
* Fixed a bug that would give you a lesser pandora's essence for every vote, rather than every runelocus vote (this occurred when awarding an item of quantity 0)
* Fixed an issue where equipping/unequipping items in the middle of queued actions (such as at the AFK zone) was causing issues with applying bonuses that shouldn't be applied
** Now equipping/unequipping/dropping items will interrupt queued actions, just like in OSRS

## Patch notes/May 04 2025
## Summary 
This update introduces a brand new searchable loot interface that shows item quantity ranges instead of single values. The update also improves the vote streak system to be more forgiving when missing a day and fixes a month-transition issue. Additionally, the Easter event has officially concluded, and Obor is now classified as a boss.

## New Loot Interface 
A brand new loot interface has been added that you can search! This comes with other usability improvements, such as showing the range of quantities an item can drop instead of just one number.

none|320px|thumb|New Loot table interface using ::loot

## Vote Streak Changes 

When you miss a day with your vote streak, it'll no longer reset it completely. It just won't bump your streak up, so you'll need to keep voting on consecutive days to increase it
An issue with votes for the month resetting around the start of the month has been fixed

## Other Changes 

The Easter event has ended as announced

Obor is now considered a 'boss', and therefore should now drop boss tokens

## Patch notes/May 18 2025
## Summary 
This major update focuses on improving the new player experience with a free starter crate, updated refer rewards, and upgraded starter weapons that provide XP boosts and scaling stats. The update also introduces practice modes for Hard Mode Cerberus and Zulrah, and includes various interface improvements and bug fixes.

## QOL / Bug fixes 

The new loot interface will no longer close when you get attacked
The new loot interface's search functionality should be much more usable now, with less weird partial query matches showing up
Azrael's pet upgrade crystal drop rate has been revealed
Pets will no longer get stuck in combat when you call them to you
The instanced KBD version now counts for KBD slayer tasks
The friends list should no longer malfunction and hold onto people you try to delete
Several instances have been adjusted to ask for what instance type you want (solo/gim/party) before you pay the entry toll
Several instances have been adjusted to no longer have an extra tick delay before entry

## Testing something 

A lot of people have requested something like this, so we're giving it a shot and seeing how it goes: Lesser Pandora's Essence has been added to the in-game donator shop for august credits
While this test is running and we gather feedback, it will not be made a promotional item - so there is no benefit to stockpiling them and waiting

## Other changes 

Olympian loot chests have had a reskin ahead of TOB being released so they are more fitting to the Olympian vibe, and don't look the same as the TOB chests
** Additionally, they now use a shared purple chest system. This may fix some of the issues with weird chest scenarios in Olympian raids
Bunny jars have been removed from the donator store
The seren model is no longer chocolatey
Monthly vote rewards can now be updated without a server reboot
"Giant Slayer" has had its talent description updated to explicitly state how it's a melee-only talent

## Starter experience revamp

## Patch notes/Nov 10 2024
## Summary 
This update introduces various quality-of-life improvements including a split private chat toggle, interface improvements, and new talent options. Boss fights have been streamlined with faster respawn options and improved mechanics. The update also introduces the official August RSPS Wiki and new transmog options including "null" armor that allows players to hide equipped items.

## Talents changes 
* You can now unlock 2 more spec slots, up to 8 maximum

## Safety Off 
A new Utility talent which can skip past warning dialogs quickly. Be careful when you use this! You may accidentally pay for things / lose items without warning when you accidentally execute actions.

There will be no refunding of items where people opt into this talent and make mistakes. No exceptions.

## Wisdom of Seren 
You are also awarded experience instead of resources from Grace of the Elves.
* You are awarded XP for the entire amount of resources that would have been given.

Unlocking this talent will lock:
* Bounty of Seren

* 1 point: 7% of the experience
* 2 points: 14% of the experience
* 3 points: 21% of the experience
* 4 points: 28% of the experience
* 5 points: 35% of the experience

## Bounty of Seren 
Gain more resources from Grace of the Elves.

Unlocking this talent will lock:
* Wisdom of Seren

* 1 point: 12% extra resources
* 2 points: 18% extra resources
* 3 points: 25% extra resources
* 4 points: 32% extra resources
* 5 points: 40% extra resources

## Bossing Changes 
* Olympian raid purples can be given to multiple group members in the same raid now
* You can now pull a lever at the start of the Hephaestus room to make the elementals spawn extremely quickly, with only a 1-tick delay
* GWD world events will respawn the GWD bosses quickly, after 5 seconds, so there will be far less downtime between bosses
** GWD bosses have also had their combat rewritten so that they can be spawned into breaches as well

## Patch notes/Nov 25 2024
## Update from Nov 25 2024 
This major update introduces Nex as an end-game boss with tier 115 equipment, adds the Dragonstone Donator Zone with unique benefits, implements six new talents across PvM/Skilling/Utility trees, rebalances Hard Mode Zulrah, and adds nearly 200 new achievements with Completionist Cape requirements. The update also includes numerous quality-of-life improvements and bug fixes.

## Dragonstone donator zone (DDZ) 
Travel here by running to the west of the home map, or by typing "::ddz"

## Slayer spawner 
Get a limited amount of instantly respawning slayer NPC spawns (aggressive) per day. Choose how many you want to spawn in a row, and how many you want to spawn at a time.
* Spawn between 1 and 5 at a time depending on rank
* Spawn between 100 and 180 slayer NPCs per day depending on rank

Nobody else can see your NPCs, so you can gather with others out in the open and chat while you're slaying.

* All drops are auto banked
* Gain DDZ points for every slayer creature killed in the DDZ
* Boss tasks DO NOT work here

## Zone skilling 
* Cook noted food at the fire, up to between 1000 and 1400 times per day (depending on rank) at Olympian rank
* Mine, fish, or fletch between 1000 and 1400 times per day (depending on rank, shared across gathering nodes) across the Amethyst Rocks, stackable Dark Crab fishing spot, or resource-less Fletching Scrapey Tree
* Get extended boss tasks at Dragonstone Nixite up to 5 times per day at Olympian rank, which assign you tasks that are 2x as long as normal Nixite boss tasks

Gain DDZ points for doing any of the above!

## DDZ in-game shop 
Spend Dragonstone Donator Zone points here!

* Dragonstone supply crate: Randomly get a bunch of skilling and/or PvM supplies once per day

## New flasks 
(Also available in the regular donator store)

* Divine Gatherer's Flask: Additional 15% chance to successfully gather an item for 1 hour
* Divine Resource Flask: Additional 15% chance to gain double resources when gathering

## Patch notes/Nov 26 2025
## Summary 
This major update introduces Yama as a new endgame boss with both normal mode and contract system, launches a competition for completing Radiant Oathplate with exclusive GFX item prizes, increases bank capacity from 1200 to 1500 slots, and includes various quality-of-life improvements and bug fixes alongside a festive Christmas home theme.

## Yama 
Check out the video here which gives an intro to the topic! Subscribe and comment to enter the giveaway for one of the first Yama GFX items of your choice (Shadow Imbued or Fire Imbued).

Thanks to a massive amount of effort from the team, Yama launches with BOTH normal mode AND contracts.

Yama has a chance to drop a Dossier, which will randomly select a contract, and give you 1 or 3 of them depending on the contract.
* Worm Acquisition and Catalyst Acquisition are not included, as those items don't have any use in August
* There is the possibility to add more custom contracts in the future which include different combinations of the fight modifiers

Drop multiplier tokens do not work at Yama. The Sage's Axe does work in the normal fight, but does not work in contracts.

Yama counts for two slayer tasks: Tormented Demons, or Yama

## Radiant Oathplate + Competition 
Each piece of Radiant Oathplate will require a Purifying Sigil to craft it, meaning you'll need 3 Purifying Sigils in total to complete your set.

## Prizes 
1. The first gamer to complete full Radiant Oathplate will win one of the Yama GFX items, picking between Shadow Imbued or Fire Imbued
2. The first gamer to complete full regular Oathplate will win a $50 bond!

## Rules 
# Competitors must submit a ticket with proof in order to win! The first ticket to provide sufficient proof of winning will take the prizes
# Account sharing is not allowed
# All pieces of Oathplate must be obtained as a drop, so we require your collection log to show you have obtained the items
# You cannot be traded contracts to complete from other players

## Patch notes/Oct 03 2024
## Update from Oct 03 2024 
This significant update introduces powerful set bonuses for raid armor sets (Luminary, Poseidon, and Titanforged), adds three new Keystone talents that can reduce attack speeds for specific combat styles, and implements major engine and client upgrades including access to the Plugin Hub. The update also includes numerous quality-of-life improvements and bug fixes to enhance overall gameplay.

## Raid Armour Set Bonuses 

## Luminary 
When wearing the full Luminary set (circlet, shoulderguards, legs), alongside your choice of heavenly weapons, you have a 25% chance to instead shoot a slow ball of light directly at the target, dealing up to 25% more damage.

## Poseidon 
When wearing the full Poseidon set (crown, brassard, tassets), you will have an Olympian Guardian (T80) follow you around as an additional pet, fighting alongside you in combat.

The Poseidon's Trident now has a special attack, which costs 100% of your special attack energy, that will summon 3 additional Olympian Guardians to fight alongside you, bringing the max number of pets that can fight with you up from 3 to 7.
* These Olympian Guardians will last for 60 seconds before disappearing until your next spec.

The Kodai wand has had its magic strength bonus lowered slightly, bringing its power down as it has been taking the spot as the no-questions-asked-always-BIS-mage-weapon for long enough in an imbalanced way.

## Titanforged 
When wearing the full Titanforged set (helmet, chestguard, legguards), when using hammers, bludgeons, bulwarks, dual hammers, or mauls, 25% of your base max hit (taking into account levels and equipment bonuses) will be added onto your minimum hit.
* For example: If your base max hit is 100, and you have the talent consistency at rank 5, you will have a minimum hit of 25 + 5.

Additionally:
* The Titanforged maul is now a 6-tick weapon
* It will always proc the fireball special effect in multicombat, hitting up to 3 extra targets for up to 20% of
